item.title: 175W满血RTX5080移动版！ROG NUC 2025 275HX+ RTX 5080 Laptop迷你主机全面评测！CPU性能图形性能都登顶！价格也登顶！
item.itunes:title: 175W满血RTX5080移动版！ROG NUC 2025 275HX+ RTX 5080 Laptop迷你主机全面评测！CPU性能图形性能都登顶！价格也登顶！
item.itunes:author: jack stone
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 了解目前市場上最高階迷你電腦（ROGNUC 2025）搭載 **Intel Ultra 9** 與 **RTX 5080** 的極致效能表現。

  • 得知這款迷你主機在 **3A 遊戲**、**AI 運算**、轉碼等方面的實測數據與業界領先地位。

  • 分析其硬體配置、介面豐富度、散熱表現，並了解作者對其**高價位**及預設記憶體配置的評價。



摘要


開箱與硬體概覽


影片中，作者 Laobai 為觀眾介紹了備受矚目的 ROGNUC 2025 迷你電腦。這款主機不僅搭載了第二代 **Intel Ultra 9 275HX 處理器**，更是配備了最新的 **Nvidia RTX 5080 筆記型單獨顯示卡**，堪稱目前市面上最豪華、頂級的迷你主機。作者表示，對於尋求同等級小型主機的升級用戶來說，ROGNUC 2025 是極為合適的選擇。



ROGNUC 2025 的包裝箱體積龐大，打開後除了主機，還看到了體積驚人的 **330 瓦 DC 電源供應器**，這是作者見過最大的迷你主機變壓器。主機本身採用塑膠鏤空機身設計，做工品質一流，但重量稍重。機身頂部有 ROG Logo，前面板設有電源鍵、耳機介面、Type-C 資料介面及雙 USB 3.2A 埠。後面板介面極為豐富，包括 19V 電源接頭、雙 HDMI 2.1、雙 DP 介面、Thunderbolt 4、2.5G 網路孔，以及四個 USB 3.2 Gen2A 埠。機身兩側及頂部均設有散熱開孔。



作者演示了徒手打開機殼的方式，只需鬆開一顆螺絲即可。內部配置上，提供了雙 **DDR5 記憶體插槽**，支援最高 **6400 MHz**。儲存方面有一個 M.2 PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD 插槽，以及側邊下方一個預留的 **PCIe 5.0 NVMe** 插槽。原廠預裝了 **32GB 記憶體**。



效能釋放與穩定性


ROGNUC 2025 的效能釋放可以透過 BIOS 進行設定，提供安靜 (平均 85W)、效能 (平均 100W)、Turbo Plus (120W) 等模式。在 Windows 中也可透過 Ultron Center 調整。作者主要在 **Turbo Plus 增強模式**下進行測試。在 AIDA64 FPU 單烤測試中，CPU 功耗從初期的 158 瓦逐漸穩定在約 **120 瓦**，整機功耗從 230 瓦以上降至約 190 瓦。長時間單烤下，CPU 功耗平均維持在 120 瓦。室溫 28 度時，CPU 最高溫度 106 度，SSD 最高 44 度，記憶體最高 45.5 度，顯示其散熱表現穩定。



CPU 效能表現


作者對 ROGNUC 2025 的 Ultra 9 275HX 處理器進行了全面的效能測試。在**轉碼測試**中，耗時 6 分 05 秒（總計 365 秒），是所有迷你主機中的最佳成績，較前代 ROGNUC 970 的 574 秒有顯著提升。**CPUZ** 多執行緒得分 16402.6，單執行緒 861.4，多執行緒效能位居所有迷你主機之首，領先 Max+ 395 約 10%，較前代提升 80%。**Geekbench 5** 多核 23442，單核 2161，創下迄今最佳多核成績。**Geekbench 6** 多核 19597，單核 2978，在所有 x86 迷你主機中排名第一，領先 Max+ 395 達 14%。**Cinebench R23** 多核 36412，單核 2198，多核分數僅略高於 Max+ 395。**Cinebench 2024** 多核 2047，單核 131，是首款多核分數突破 2000 的迷你主機，較前代提升 80%。**PassMark** 多執行緒 62547，單執行緒 4830，多執行緒同樣位居第一，顯著超越 Max+ 395 及前代 ROGNUC 970。作者總結，ROGNUC 2025 的 275HX CPU 在所有迷你電腦中具有最強的性能，甚至略微領先 AMD Ryzen 9 Max+ 395。



GPU 與遊戲效能


顯示卡部分，ROGNUC 2025 搭載的 **Nvidia RTX 5080 筆記型單獨顯示卡**是作者測試過所有迷你主機中效能最強大的，基本上能勝任 **4K 3A 遊戲**的需求。RTX 5080 筆記型版本擁有 7680 個 CUDA 核心，16GB GDDR7 顯示記憶體，頻寬 900GB/s，並能達成 **175 瓦**的滿血效能釋放。遊戲測試數據亮眼：**地平線 5** (4K 極限畫質，開啟兩倍反鋸齒，不開 DLSS) 普通場景約 110 幀，複雜場景約 90 幀；**地平線 4** (4K 全畫質) 全程超過 110 幀；**古墓奇兵：暗影** (4K 最高畫質) 平均幀數 97；**狂野之心** (4K 超高畫質) 平均幀數 65。在熱門的**黑神話：悟空**測試 (4K, 過度取樣 50, 開啟 DLSS 生成幀) 中，全畫質平均幀數 145；開啟光追超高模式後，平均幀數仍有 113 幀 (需開啟 4 倍生成幀)。



結合 FurMark 單烤 RTX 5080 (滿血 175W) 與 CPU-Z 雙烤，CPU 平均效能釋放達 100 瓦。**3DMark** 測試成績 Time Spy 21737、Fire Strike 48164、Steel Nomad Light 163.44fps (穩定性 97.8%)，所有數據均超越 RTX 4090 筆記型版本，證明其 175 瓦滿血效能名符其實。



其他方面：AI, 顯示, 儲存, 網路


除了遊戲效能，ROGNUC 2025 在 **AI 大語言模型運算**方面表現極為出色。測試 Llama 3.1 (蛇形編程) 達到 93.96 tok/s，遠遠超越 4090、4080、3080 筆記型版本，可謂破表成績。顯示介面輸出方面，HDMI 介面直連獨顯，支援最高 **4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB** (符合 HDMI 2.1)。Thunderbolt 4 介面連接核顯輸出 DP 訊號，支援最高 4K 144Hz 8-bit RGB (搭配螢幕超頻可達 4K 160Hz 8-bit)。連接 Sony OLED 電視時，可輸出 4K 120Hz 12-bit RGB 訊號。RTX 5080 支援解碼最高 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片，可流暢播放 YouTube 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片。



原廠 PCIe 4.0 NVMe 硬碟測試速度約 6800MB/s，達到 PCIe 4.0x4 的優秀水準。**WiFi 7** (Killer BE1750) 無線網卡在作者環境下跑出 780 Mbps 的良好速度。使用 iperf3 測試 Killer E3100G **2.5G 網路卡**內網性能，單線程及多線程上下載均接近 2.35G，可跑滿頻寬且無相容性問題。



功耗、散熱與噪音


ROGNUC 2025 在 Ultra 9 275HX CPU 120 瓦及 RTX 5080 筆記型顯示卡 175 瓦的效能釋放下，雙烤時整機功耗超過 **330 瓦**，作者對隨附的 330 瓦變壓器表示擔憂。待機時最大功耗 44 瓦。在效能增強模式下，CPU 滿載時機身噪音約 55 分貝，退至耳邊約 51 分貝，作者認為其散熱及噪音控制表現穩定。



總結與評價


作者總結 ROGNUC 2025 搭載 Ultra 9 275HX (120W) 和 RTX 5080 (175W) 的組合，再次達到了迷你電腦的**效能巔峰**，是目前綜合性能最強的迷你主機。其介面配置達到極高水準，支援雙 M.2 PCIe 5.0/4.0 儲存，並提供多達 4 個高刷顯示輸出介面。除了顯而易見的**高昂價格**外，作者認為預設只配置 **32GB 記憶體**是其一大缺點，認為如此頂級的主機至少應配備 64GB。總體而言，ROGNUC 2025 做工優異、散熱穩定、噪音低、介面完整且相容性高，CPU 和顯示卡性能都表現出色，可視為最豪華的單獨顯示迷你電腦。這款主機適合**預算充足**且需要使用迷你電腦暢玩 **3A 遊戲**的用戶。



影片最後，作者 Laobai 感謝大家的收看並道別。



================================================

# Intro

The mini-console monster of the year is on the scene. not only with the second-generation Ultra9 CPU. but also with the latest Nvidia mobile solo display. This is the most luxurious top-of-the-line mini to date. Hello everyone,. I'm Laobai, and today I'm. going to introduce you to. the 3A game mini computer with. Ultra9275HX processor and RTX5080 mobile single display. ROGNUC2025. I've been using this Phantom Canyon. for many years,. and if I want to upgrade to the same level of small mainframe,. Which one do you think is the most suitable? ROGNUC2025 Appliance Intel Ultra9275HX 24-core,. 24-thread mobile CPU appliance. Nvidia RTX5080 mobile single display,. 16GB GDDR7 video memory,. dual-channel DDR5 memory,. 6400 MHz, M.2PCIe5. 0 and 4.0 nvme interfaces,. Quad display output. 2.5G network card plus WiFi 7.

# 配件与接口

Only the ROGNUC Mini comes. in such a huge package. Open it and have a look. The mainframe and accessories are all here,. and the power cord manual. is. a super brick. Large power supply 19.5 volts. 16.92 amps. 330 watts total. the largest DC power supply I have ever seen. The small host is a plastic hollowed-out body design. with first-class workmanship quality. It's just a little heavy. ROG logo, on top. Front panel: power switch key. headset interface. TypeC data interface. dual USB 3.2A ports. Rear panel: 19V power connector,. dual HDMI 2.1 connector, dual DP connector, Thunderbolt 4 connector,. 2.5G network connector,. There are vents. at the back and top. of both sides of. the four USB 3.2 Gen2A. ports. Loosen this screw, and you'll be all right. Open the lid by hand.

The position on the right side and the position on the left side are. two points of effort. Let's try it. I cut this side out first. It took a lot of. effort to pull the other side apart. Let's look at the internal interface,. Dual DDR5 memory slots. supporting up to 6400 MHz, an M. 2 PCIe 4.0 nvme SSD,. and a spare 5.0 nvme slot under the side. This wire is the power line of Shenguang synchronization.

# 稳定度与性能测试

The BIOS shows 6400 megahertz of preinstalled memory. but only 16 gigabytes. 32g in total. You can set the performance release. which is ultimately set here in the fan. Quiet Mode Average 85W Performance Mode Average 100W Turbo Plus Mode. 120W. After starting Windows,. you can also set. the performance mode in Ultron Center. Quiet performance enhancement We. conducted this test. in Turbo enhancement mode,. and stability is one of our most important concerns. We opened the pressure test of AIDA64. running FPU single baking,. and after 1 minute and 30 seconds,. the CPU power consumption gradually declined from 158 watts to. about 120 watts. The power consumption of the whole machine is reduced from. more than 230 watts to about 190 watts. The CPU frequency ran at 3.7 gigahertz. and then stayed within. an hour of a single bake. CPU power consumption of the ROGNUC2025 remains at. an average of 120 watts When. the room temperature is 28 degrees,. the maximum CPU temperature is 106 degrees,. the maximum SSD temperature is 44 degrees,. and the maximum memory temperature is 45.5 degrees. Let's first use the Ultra9275HX of the ROGNUC2025 small host. to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result is 6 minutes and 05 seconds. totaling 365 seconds. This result is the best ranking of all mini. hosts. First. The previous generation ROGNUC970 was 574 seconds.

The performance of ROGNUC 2025 version. has been greatly improved compared with it. CPUZ multi-threaded 16402. 6, single-threaded 861. 4, multi-threaded performance tops all mini-hosts,. surpassing all other mini-hosts. 10% lead over. Max + 395. 80% improvement over the previous generation. ROGNUC970. Geekbench5,. Multi-Core 23442, Single Core 2161. Best multi-core results to date. Geekbench 6 multi-core,. 19597 single-core and 2978 multi-core. ranked first among all x86 mini hosts,. surpassing Max + 39514%. Cinebench R23 Multi-Core 36412 Single Core 2198. The multi-core score is only one drop higher than. Max +. 395. Cine bench2024, Multi-core 2047,. Single-core 131. Our first multi-core mini-console. scored 2000 points,. surpassing the previous generation ROGNUC97080%. PassMark multi-threaded 62547. single-threaded 4830. multi-threaded ranked first. surpassing Max + 395. and also significantly surpassing the previous generation of ROGNUC 970. On the whole,. the 275HX CPU of. ROGNUC2025 has the strongest performance. among all mini-computers. It's also slightly ahead of. the AMD Ryzen 9 Max + 395 we tested. Then look. at.

the entertainment master total score 2455372 CPU score 1139977.

# 图形与游戏性能

Then play. the game Horizon 5: 4K extreme picture quality,. turn on twice anti-aliasing,. do. not open DLSS ordinary scene 110 frames,. complex scene 90 frames.

Challenge Horizon 5: 4K full image quality,. double anti-aliasing, close to 90 frames. for ordinary scenes. without DLSS,. close to 80 frames. for complex scenes.

Horizon 4: 4K full Picture quality. More than 110 frames in the whole course.

Tomb Raider Shadow: 4K Highest Quality Running. Evaluation Test Average Frame 97. Frames,. Wild Arms 2: 4K Ultra High Quality Running Evaluation. Test Average Frame. 65,. Finally, let's test the Black Myth Wukong 4K. oversampling 50DLSS. to open the frame to generate full video quality. The test result. is 145 frames on average. The average frame result of the test with Ray Tracing Ultra High Mode. turned on was 113 frames,. which must have been generated with 4x frames turned on. In actual combat,.

The performance of. this graphics card is the most powerful of all the mini-consoles. I tested. It's basically a 4K3A game. From the CUDA core,. the Nvidia RTX5080 mobile version has 7680 video memories. with a bandwidth. of 900GB/s. FurMark Single Baked RTX5080 Laptop Mobile Edition Full Blood 175 Watt.

With the addition of CPU Z double baking. the average CPU performance release reached 100 watts. We. ran 3DMark test,. TimeSpy21737 FireStrike48164 SteelNomadLight163. 44fps, 97.8% stability. The test data of 3DMark is also made into a chart. Let's take a look,. all the data are more. than second RTX4090 Laptop mobile version,. which is worthy of 175 watts of full blood play. RTX5080Laptop. 900GB bandwidth, RTX5080 mobile version,. we also. ran Llama3.1 big language model test,. or snake programming,. the result is 93.96 tok/s. Breaking the table,. far more than 40904080 mobile version. and 3080 mobile version. Qwen314B. 34.6tok/s. Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantization model. I used Vulkan. The best result is 30tok/s.

# 显示存储网络

The display interface outputs. a single display directly connected HDMI interface,. which supports. up to 4K144 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output. and meets the HDMI 2.1standard. The Thunderbolt 4 interface connected to. the nuclear display. outputs DP signals and supports. up to 4K144 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor. supports DP interface. After overclocking to 160 Hz,. the Thunderbolt 4 interface can support. 4K 160 Hz 8-bit RGB signal output. Sony OLED. TV connected to HDMI cable,. small host can. output 4K 120 Hz 12-bit RGB display signal. Nvidia RTX5080 Laptop Video Decoder can decode up to 8K. AV1 video. with 60 frames. YouTube 8K 60 frame AV1 video can be played. smoothly. The original PCIe4.0 nvme hard disk test is 6800MB/s,. reaching. the very good level of PCIe4.0X4. The WiFi test KillerBE1750WiFi7. wireless card ran at 780 Mbps,. which is. a good level in my wireless network environment. We also used iperf3 to test the intranet performance. of the Killer E3100G 2.5g network card. Both single-threaded uploads and downloads. and multi-threaded uploads and downloads are. close to 2. 35 G,. running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

The ROGNUC 2025 version. delivers 120 watts. of performance from. the Intel Ultra9275HX CPU and the Nvidia RTX5080 Laptop Mobile Single Display CPU. GPU full 175 watts of performance release. Let's show you the list directly. Double baking machine power consumption more than 330 watts standby. maximum power consumption of 44 watts,. according to the above results 330. watts of brick power supply is also worrying ah! When the room temperature is 30 degrees. CPU standby temperature is 57 degrees. GPU standby temperature is 48 degrees. SSD standby temperature is 42 degrees. In the enhanced mode of this small mainframe,. the body noise is 55 decibels. when the CPU is fully loaded. Withdrawn to the ear is 51 decibels.

# 最后总结

ROGNUC2025 version. is equipped with. Ultra9275HX CPU and RTX5080 mobile version. CPU or GPU once again reached the peak. of the mini computer super small host. It is also the most comprehensive performance of the mini computer. The interface configuration has reached a very high level,. with dual nvme storage of M.2 PCIe 5.0 and 4.0,. and a display output interface of up to 4 high brushes. In addition to the high price,. this small host also. has a disadvantage that the memory configuration. is actually 32 gigabytes. Such an invincible small host should start at least 64g, right? Summing up the CPU performance. 120 watts of performance release. GPU 175 watts of full blood performance release. easy to reach the top. Excellent workmanship. stable heat dissipation and silence. complete interfaces. high interface compatibility. CPU performance and graphics performance. Interface work. it has a very good performance. can be regarded as the most luxurious single mini computer. the price has reached the top level. Worthy of performance,. this is one of the most luxurious 3A gaming mini-computers. Suitable for friends who are. not short of money and need. to use mini computers to play 3A games. item.description:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 了解目前市場上最高階迷你電腦（ROGNUC 2025）搭載 **Intel Ultra 9** 與 **RTX 5080** 的極致效能表現。

  • 得知這款迷你主機在 **3A 遊戲**、**AI 運算**、轉碼等方面的實測數據與業界領先地位。

  • 分析其硬體配置、介面豐富度、散熱表現，並了解作者對其**高價位**及預設記憶體配置的評價。



摘要


開箱與硬體概覽


影片中，作者 Laobai 為觀眾介紹了備受矚目的 ROGNUC 2025 迷你電腦。這款主機不僅搭載了第二代 **Intel Ultra 9 275HX 處理器**，更是配備了最新的 **Nvidia RTX 5080 筆記型單獨顯示卡**，堪稱目前市面上最豪華、頂級的迷你主機。作者表示，對於尋求同等級小型主機的升級用戶來說，ROGNUC 2025 是極為合適的選擇。



ROGNUC 2025 的包裝箱體積龐大，打開後除了主機，還看到了體積驚人的 **330 瓦 DC 電源供應器**，這是作者見過最大的迷你主機變壓器。主機本身採用塑膠鏤空機身設計，做工品質一流，但重量稍重。機身頂部有 ROG Logo，前面板設有電源鍵、耳機介面、Type-C 資料介面及雙 USB 3.2A 埠。後面板介面極為豐富，包括 19V 電源接頭、雙 HDMI 2.1、雙 DP 介面、Thunderbolt 4、2.5G 網路孔，以及四個 USB 3.2 Gen2A 埠。機身兩側及頂部均設有散熱開孔。



作者演示了徒手打開機殼的方式，只需鬆開一顆螺絲即可。內部配置上，提供了雙 **DDR5 記憶體插槽**，支援最高 **6400 MHz**。儲存方面有一個 M.2 PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD 插槽，以及側邊下方一個預留的 **PCIe 5.0 NVMe** 插槽。原廠預裝了 **32GB 記憶體**。



效能釋放與穩定性


ROGNUC 2025 的效能釋放可以透過 BIOS 進行設定，提供安靜 (平均 85W)、效能 (平均 100W)、Turbo Plus (120W) 等模式。在 Windows 中也可透過 Ultron Center 調整。作者主要在 **Turbo Plus 增強模式**下進行測試。在 AIDA64 FPU 單烤測試中，CPU 功耗從初期的 158 瓦逐漸穩定在約 **120 瓦**，整機功耗從 230 瓦以上降至約 190 瓦。長時間單烤下，CPU 功耗平均維持在 120 瓦。室溫 28 度時，CPU 最高溫度 106 度，SSD 最高 44 度，記憶體最高 45.5 度，顯示其散熱表現穩定。



CPU 效能表現


作者對 ROGNUC 2025 的 Ultra 9 275HX 處理器進行了全面的效能測試。在**轉碼測試**中，耗時 6 分 05 秒（總計 365 秒），是所有迷你主機中的最佳成績，較前代 ROGNUC 970 的 574 秒有顯著提升。**CPUZ** 多執行緒得分 16402.6，單執行緒 861.4，多執行緒效能位居所有迷你主機之首，領先 Max+ 395 約 10%，較前代提升 80%。**Geekbench 5** 多核 23442，單核 2161，創下迄今最佳多核成績。**Geekbench 6** 多核 19597，單核 2978，在所有 x86 迷你主機中排名第一，領先 Max+ 395 達 14%。**Cinebench R23** 多核 36412，單核 2198，多核分數僅略高於 Max+ 395。**Cinebench 2024** 多核 2047，單核 131，是首款多核分數突破 2000 的迷你主機，較前代提升 80%。**PassMark** 多執行緒 62547，單執行緒 4830，多執行緒同樣位居第一，顯著超越 Max+ 395 及前代 ROGNUC 970。作者總結，ROGNUC 2025 的 275HX CPU 在所有迷你電腦中具有最強的性能，甚至略微領先 AMD Ryzen 9 Max+ 395。



GPU 與遊戲效能


顯示卡部分，ROGNUC 2025 搭載的 **Nvidia RTX 5080 筆記型單獨顯示卡**是作者測試過所有迷你主機中效能最強大的，基本上能勝任 **4K 3A 遊戲**的需求。RTX 5080 筆記型版本擁有 7680 個 CUDA 核心，16GB GDDR7 顯示記憶體，頻寬 900GB/s，並能達成 **175 瓦**的滿血效能釋放。遊戲測試數據亮眼：**地平線 5** (4K 極限畫質，開啟兩倍反鋸齒，不開 DLSS) 普通場景約 110 幀，複雜場景約 90 幀；**地平線 4** (4K 全畫質) 全程超過 110 幀；**古墓奇兵：暗影** (4K 最高畫質) 平均幀數 97；**狂野之心** (4K 超高畫質) 平均幀數 65。在熱門的**黑神話：悟空**測試 (4K, 過度取樣 50, 開啟 DLSS 生成幀) 中，全畫質平均幀數 145；開啟光追超高模式後，平均幀數仍有 113 幀 (需開啟 4 倍生成幀)。



結合 FurMark 單烤 RTX 5080 (滿血 175W) 與 CPU-Z 雙烤，CPU 平均效能釋放達 100 瓦。**3DMark** 測試成績 Time Spy 21737、Fire Strike 48164、Steel Nomad Light 163.44fps (穩定性 97.8%)，所有數據均超越 RTX 4090 筆記型版本，證明其 175 瓦滿血效能名符其實。



其他方面：AI, 顯示, 儲存, 網路


除了遊戲效能，ROGNUC 2025 在 **AI 大語言模型運算**方面表現極為出色。測試 Llama 3.1 (蛇形編程) 達到 93.96 tok/s，遠遠超越 4090、4080、3080 筆記型版本，可謂破表成績。顯示介面輸出方面，HDMI 介面直連獨顯，支援最高 **4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB** (符合 HDMI 2.1)。Thunderbolt 4 介面連接核顯輸出 DP 訊號，支援最高 4K 144Hz 8-bit RGB (搭配螢幕超頻可達 4K 160Hz 8-bit)。連接 Sony OLED 電視時，可輸出 4K 120Hz 12-bit RGB 訊號。RTX 5080 支援解碼最高 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片，可流暢播放 YouTube 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片。



原廠 PCIe 4.0 NVMe 硬碟測試速度約 6800MB/s，達到 PCIe 4.0x4 的優秀水準。**WiFi 7** (Killer BE1750) 無線網卡在作者環境下跑出 780 Mbps 的良好速度。使用 iperf3 測試 Killer E3100G **2.5G 網路卡**內網性能，單線程及多線程上下載均接近 2.35G，可跑滿頻寬且無相容性問題。



功耗、散熱與噪音


ROGNUC 2025 在 Ultra 9 275HX CPU 120 瓦及 RTX 5080 筆記型顯示卡 175 瓦的效能釋放下，雙烤時整機功耗超過 **330 瓦**，作者對隨附的 330 瓦變壓器表示擔憂。待機時最大功耗 44 瓦。在效能增強模式下，CPU 滿載時機身噪音約 55 分貝，退至耳邊約 51 分貝，作者認為其散熱及噪音控制表現穩定。



總結與評價


作者總結 ROGNUC 2025 搭載 Ultra 9 275HX (120W) 和 RTX 5080 (175W) 的組合，再次達到了迷你電腦的**效能巔峰**，是目前綜合性能最強的迷你主機。其介面配置達到極高水準，支援雙 M.2 PCIe 5.0/4.0 儲存，並提供多達 4 個高刷顯示輸出介面。除了顯而易見的**高昂價格**外，作者認為預設只配置 **32GB 記憶體**是其一大缺點，認為如此頂級的主機至少應配備 64GB。總體而言，ROGNUC 2025 做工優異、散熱穩定、噪音低、介面完整且相容性高，CPU 和顯示卡性能都表現出色，可視為最豪華的單獨顯示迷你電腦。這款主機適合**預算充足**且需要使用迷你電腦暢玩 **3A 遊戲**的用戶。



影片最後，作者 Laobai 感謝大家的收看並道別。



================================================

# Intro

The mini-console monster of the year is on the scene. not only with the second-generation Ultra9 CPU. but also with the latest Nvidia mobile solo display. This is the most luxurious top-of-the-line mini to date. Hello everyone,. I'm Laobai, and today I'm. going to introduce you to. the 3A game mini computer with. Ultra9275HX processor and RTX5080 mobile single display. ROGNUC2025. I've been using this Phantom Canyon. for many years,. and if I want to upgrade to the same level of small mainframe,. Which one do you think is the most suitable? ROGNUC2025 Appliance Intel Ultra9275HX 24-core,. 24-thread mobile CPU appliance. Nvidia RTX5080 mobile single display,. 16GB GDDR7 video memory,. dual-channel DDR5 memory,. 6400 MHz, M.2PCIe5. 0 and 4.0 nvme interfaces,. Quad display output. 2.5G network card plus WiFi 7.

# 配件与接口

Only the ROGNUC Mini comes. in such a huge package. Open it and have a look. The mainframe and accessories are all here,. and the power cord manual. is. a super brick. Large power supply 19.5 volts. 16.92 amps. 330 watts total. the largest DC power supply I have ever seen. The small host is a plastic hollowed-out body design. with first-class workmanship quality. It's just a little heavy. ROG logo, on top. Front panel: power switch key. headset interface. TypeC data interface. dual USB 3.2A ports. Rear panel: 19V power connector,. dual HDMI 2.1 connector, dual DP connector, Thunderbolt 4 connector,. 2.5G network connector,. There are vents. at the back and top. of both sides of. the four USB 3.2 Gen2A. ports. Loosen this screw, and you'll be all right. Open the lid by hand.

The position on the right side and the position on the left side are. two points of effort. Let's try it. I cut this side out first. It took a lot of. effort to pull the other side apart. Let's look at the internal interface,. Dual DDR5 memory slots. supporting up to 6400 MHz, an M. 2 PCIe 4.0 nvme SSD,. and a spare 5.0 nvme slot under the side. This wire is the power line of Shenguang synchronization.

# 稳定度与性能测试

The BIOS shows 6400 megahertz of preinstalled memory. but only 16 gigabytes. 32g in total. You can set the performance release. which is ultimately set here in the fan. Quiet Mode Average 85W Performance Mode Average 100W Turbo Plus Mode. 120W. After starting Windows,. you can also set. the performance mode in Ultron Center. Quiet performance enhancement We. conducted this test. in Turbo enhancement mode,. and stability is one of our most important concerns. We opened the pressure test of AIDA64. running FPU single baking,. and after 1 minute and 30 seconds,. the CPU power consumption gradually declined from 158 watts to. about 120 watts. The power consumption of the whole machine is reduced from. more than 230 watts to about 190 watts. The CPU frequency ran at 3.7 gigahertz. and then stayed within. an hour of a single bake. CPU power consumption of the ROGNUC2025 remains at. an average of 120 watts When. the room temperature is 28 degrees,. the maximum CPU temperature is 106 degrees,. the maximum SSD temperature is 44 degrees,. and the maximum memory temperature is 45.5 degrees. Let's first use the Ultra9275HX of the ROGNUC2025 small host. to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result is 6 minutes and 05 seconds. totaling 365 seconds. This result is the best ranking of all mini. hosts. First. The previous generation ROGNUC970 was 574 seconds.

The performance of ROGNUC 2025 version. has been greatly improved compared with it. CPUZ multi-threaded 16402. 6, single-threaded 861. 4, multi-threaded performance tops all mini-hosts,. surpassing all other mini-hosts. 10% lead over. Max + 395. 80% improvement over the previous generation. ROGNUC970. Geekbench5,. Multi-Core 23442, Single Core 2161. Best multi-core results to date. Geekbench 6 multi-core,. 19597 single-core and 2978 multi-core. ranked first among all x86 mini hosts,. surpassing Max + 39514%. Cinebench R23 Multi-Core 36412 Single Core 2198. The multi-core score is only one drop higher than. Max +. 395. Cine bench2024, Multi-core 2047,. Single-core 131. Our first multi-core mini-console. scored 2000 points,. surpassing the previous generation ROGNUC97080%. PassMark multi-threaded 62547. single-threaded 4830. multi-threaded ranked first. surpassing Max + 395. and also significantly surpassing the previous generation of ROGNUC 970. On the whole,. the 275HX CPU of. ROGNUC2025 has the strongest performance. among all mini-computers. It's also slightly ahead of. the AMD Ryzen 9 Max + 395 we tested. Then look. at.

the entertainment master total score 2455372 CPU score 1139977.

# 图形与游戏性能

Horizon 4: 4K full Picture quality. More than 110 frames in the whole course.

TV connected to HDMI cable,. small host can. output 4K 120 Hz 12-bit RGB display signal. Nvidia RTX5080 Laptop Video Decoder can decode up to 8K. AV1 video. with 60 frames. The WiFi test KillerBE1750WiFi7. wireless card ran at 780 Mbps,. which is. a good level in my wireless network environment. The ROGNUC 2025 version. delivers 120 watts. of performance from. the Intel Ultra9275HX CPU and the Nvidia RTX5080 Laptop Mobile Single Display CPU. GPU full 175 watts of performance release. item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 了解目前市場上最高階迷你電腦（ROGNUC 2025）搭載 **Intel Ultra 9** 與 **RTX 5080** 的極致效能表現。

  • 得知這款迷你主機在 **3A 遊戲**、**AI 運算**、轉碼等方面的實測數據與業界領先地位。

  • 分析其硬體配置、介面豐富度、散熱表現，並了解作者對其**高價位**及預設記憶體配置的評價。



摘要


開箱與硬體概覽


影片中，作者 Laobai 為觀眾介紹了備受矚目的 ROGNUC 2025 迷你電腦。這款主機不僅搭載了第二代 **Intel Ultra 9 275HX 處理器**，更是配備了最新的 **Nvidia RTX 5080 筆記型單獨顯示卡**，堪稱目前市面上最豪華、頂級的迷你主機。作者表示，對於尋求同等級小型主機的升級用戶來說，ROGNUC 2025 是極為合適的選擇。



ROGNUC 2025 的包裝箱體積龐大，打開後除了主機，還看到了體積驚人的 **330 瓦 DC 電源供應器**，這是作者見過最大的迷你主機變壓器。主機本身採用塑膠鏤空機身設計，做工品質一流，但重量稍重。機身頂部有 ROG Logo，前面板設有電源鍵、耳機介面、Type-C 資料介面及雙 USB 3.2A 埠。後面板介面極為豐富，包括 19V 電源接頭、雙 HDMI 2.1、雙 DP 介面、Thunderbolt 4、2.5G 網路孔，以及四個 USB 3.2 Gen2A 埠。機身兩側及頂部均設有散熱開孔。



作者演示了徒手打開機殼的方式，只需鬆開一顆螺絲即可。內部配置上，提供了雙 **DDR5 記憶體插槽**，支援最高 **6400 MHz**。儲存方面有一個 M.2 PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD 插槽，以及側邊下方一個預留的 **PCIe 5.0 NVMe** 插槽。原廠預裝了 **32GB 記憶體**。



效能釋放與穩定性


ROGNUC 2025 的效能釋放可以透過 BIOS 進行設定，提供安靜 (平均 85W)、效能 (平均 100W)、Turbo Plus (120W) 等模式。在 Windows 中也可透過 Ultron Center 調整。作者主要在 **Turbo Plus 增強模式**下進行測試。在 AIDA64 FPU 單烤測試中，CPU 功耗從初期的 158 瓦逐漸穩定在約 **120 瓦**，整機功耗從 230 瓦以上降至約 190 瓦。長時間單烤下，CPU 功耗平均維持在 120 瓦。室溫 28 度時，CPU 最高溫度 106 度，SSD 最高 44 度，記憶體最高 45.5 度，顯示其散熱表現穩定。



CPU 效能表現


作者對 ROGNUC 2025 的 Ultra 9 275HX 處理器進行了全面的效能測試。在**轉碼測試**中，耗時 6 分 05 秒（總計 365 秒），是所有迷你主機中的最佳成績，較前代 ROGNUC 970 的 574 秒有顯著提升。**CPUZ** 多執行緒得分 16402.6，單執行緒 861.4，多執行緒效能位居所有迷你主機之首，領先 Max+ 395 約 10%，較前代提升 80%。**Geekbench 5** 多核 23442，單核 2161，創下迄今最佳多核成績。**Geekbench 6** 多核 19597，單核 2978，在所有 x86 迷你主機中排名第一，領先 Max+ 395 達 14%。**Cinebench R23** 多核 36412，單核 2198，多核分數僅略高於 Max+ 395。**Cinebench 2024** 多核 2047，單核 131，是首款多核分數突破 2000 的迷你主機，較前代提升 80%。**PassMark** 多執行緒 62547，單執行緒 4830，多執行緒同樣位居第一，顯著超越 Max+ 395 及前代 ROGNUC 970。作者總結，ROGNUC 2025 的 275HX CPU 在所有迷你電腦中具有最強的性能，甚至略微領先 AMD Ryzen 9 Max+ 395。



GPU 與遊戲效能


顯示卡部分，ROGNUC 2025 搭載的 **Nvidia RTX 5080 筆記型單獨顯示卡**是作者測試過所有迷你主機中效能最強大的，基本上能勝任 **4K 3A 遊戲**的需求。RTX 5080 筆記型版本擁有 7680 個 CUDA 核心，16GB GDDR7 顯示記憶體，頻寬 900GB/s，並能達成 **175 瓦**的滿血效能釋放。遊戲測試數據亮眼：**地平線 5** (4K 極限畫質，開啟兩倍反鋸齒，不開 DLSS) 普通場景約 110 幀，複雜場景約 90 幀；**地平線 4** (4K 全畫質) 全程超過 110 幀；**古墓奇兵：暗影** (4K 最高畫質) 平均幀數 97；**狂野之心** (4K 超高畫質) 平均幀數 65。在熱門的**黑神話：悟空**測試 (4K, 過度取樣 50, 開啟 DLSS 生成幀) 中，全畫質平均幀數 145；開啟光追超高模式後，平均幀數仍有 113 幀 (需開啟 4 倍生成幀)。



結合 FurMark 單烤 RTX 5080 (滿血 175W) 與 CPU-Z 雙烤，CPU 平均效能釋放達 100 瓦。**3DMark** 測試成績 Time Spy 21737、Fire Strike 48164、Steel Nomad Light 163.44fps (穩定性 97.8%)，所有數據均超越 RTX 4090 筆記型版本，證明其 175 瓦滿血效能名符其實。



其他方面：AI, 顯示, 儲存, 網路


除了遊戲效能，ROGNUC 2025 在 **AI 大語言模型運算**方面表現極為出色。測試 Llama 3.1 (蛇形編程) 達到 93.96 tok/s，遠遠超越 4090、4080、3080 筆記型版本，可謂破表成績。顯示介面輸出方面，HDMI 介面直連獨顯，支援最高 **4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB** (符合 HDMI 2.1)。Thunderbolt 4 介面連接核顯輸出 DP 訊號，支援最高 4K 144Hz 8-bit RGB (搭配螢幕超頻可達 4K 160Hz 8-bit)。連接 Sony OLED 電視時，可輸出 4K 120Hz 12-bit RGB 訊號。RTX 5080 支援解碼最高 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片，可流暢播放 YouTube 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片。



原廠 PCIe 4.0 NVMe 硬碟測試速度約 6800MB/s，達到 PCIe 4.0x4 的優秀水準。**WiFi 7** (Killer BE1750) 無線網卡在作者環境下跑出 780 Mbps 的良好速度。使用 iperf3 測試 Killer E3100G **2.5G 網路卡**內網性能，單線程及多線程上下載均接近 2.35G，可跑滿頻寬且無相容性問題。



功耗、散熱與噪音


ROGNUC 2025 在 Ultra 9 275HX CPU 120 瓦及 RTX 5080 筆記型顯示卡 175 瓦的效能釋放下，雙烤時整機功耗超過 **330 瓦**，作者對隨附的 330 瓦變壓器表示擔憂。待機時最大功耗 44 瓦。在效能增強模式下，CPU 滿載時機身噪音約 55 分貝，退至耳邊約 51 分貝，作者認為其散熱及噪音控制表現穩定。



總結與評價


作者總結 ROGNUC 2025 搭載 Ultra 9 275HX (120W) 和 RTX 5080 (175W) 的組合，再次達到了迷你電腦的**效能巔峰**，是目前綜合性能最強的迷你主機。其介面配置達到極高水準，支援雙 M.2 PCIe 5.0/4.0 儲存，並提供多達 4 個高刷顯示輸出介面。除了顯而易見的**高昂價格**外，作者認為預設只配置 **32GB 記憶體**是其一大缺點，認為如此頂級的主機至少應配備 64GB。總體而言，ROGNUC 2025 做工優異、散熱穩定、噪音低、介面完整且相容性高，CPU 和顯示卡性能都表現出色，可視為最豪華的單獨顯示迷你電腦。這款主機適合**預算充足**且需要使用迷你電腦暢玩 **3A 遊戲**的用戶。



影片最後，作者 Laobai 感謝大家的收看並道別。

item.title: 一手可握！Geekom积核IT13 13900HK 迷你主机评测！经典NUC造型！双USB4双HDMI 4显示接口三存储！
item.itunes:title: 一手可握！Geekom积核IT13 13900HK 迷你主机评测！经典NUC造型！双USB4双HDMI 4显示接口三存储！
item.itunes:author: jack stone
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解搭載 Intel i9-13900HK 高效能處理器的 GEEKOM Core IT13 迷你主機的實際表現。
  • 比較該主機在各種基準測試（CPUZ、Geekbench、Cinebench、PassMark）中的多核心與單核心效能，並與第一代及第二代 Intel Ultra 處理器進行對比。
  • 了解這款迷你主機在多顯示輸出、儲存擴充、網路（包括 2.5G 與 WiFi 6E）、遊戲、甚至 AI 模型運算方面的具體能力與測試結果。

摘要

作者 Laobai 在本期影片中，為觀眾介紹了 GEEKOM Core IT13 迷你主機的 2025 版本，這款主機搭載了 Intel 第 13 代的 i9-13900HK 高效能移動版處理器。儘管 Intel 已推出新一代的 Ultra 處理器，但 13 代 i9 仍是目前迷你主機市場上的主流頂級配置之一。作者探討了在當前時間點，選擇 13 代 Core 處理器或新款 Ultra 處理器的考量點。

GEEKOM Core IT13 配備了 14 核心 20 執行緒的 i9-13900HK 處理器、Intel Iris Xe 內建顯示晶片 (96EU)、雙通道 DDR4 3200MHz 記憶體、三個儲存介面、四個螢幕顯示輸出、2.5G 網路卡和 WiFi 6E。開箱配件包括電源線、HDMI 線、顯示器背掛架等。主機採用金屬中框和底蓋，搭配塑膠機身和上蓋，體積小巧。

主機的介面配置豐富，前面板有雙 USB 3.2 A (10Gbps) 埠和耳機孔，後面板則有電源介面、兩個支援 DP 輸出的 USB4 介面、兩個 HDMI 2.0 介面、一個 2.5G 網路孔、一個 USB 3.2 A 埠和一個 USB 2.0 埠。側邊還有一個 SD 讀卡機。其經典的開啟方式與 Intel NUC 相似，透過鬆開底部螺絲即可打開。

內部配置與效能設定

打開機身後，可以看到雙通道的 DDR4 記憶體插槽、一個 M.2 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 介面和一個 M.2 SATA 介面，底板上還可以安裝一個 2.5 吋 SSD。作者展示了已安裝好的 32GB DDR4 記憶體。在 BIOS 中，提供了靜音 (20W)、平衡 (35W) 和效能 (45W) 三種功耗釋放選項。本次測試選擇了預設的 45W 效能釋放模式。

穩定性與基準效能測試

作者進行了 AIDA64 FPU 單烤壓力測試，在 45W 功耗釋放下，CPU 功耗穩定在 45W，整機功耗約 65W，CPU 平均頻率約 3 GHz，烤機一小時十九分鐘後，CPU 最高溫度達到 96 度，SSD 最高溫度 40 度，表現穩定。

影片轉碼測試中，13900HK 完成任務耗時 13 分 2 秒（782 秒）。CPU 基準測試部分：CPUZ 多核心 7083.7 分，單核心 782.8 分，多核心超越第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心接近第一代 Ultra 9。Geekbench 5 多核心 11302 分，單核心 1942 分，多核心領先第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心領先第一代 Ultra 9。Geekbench 6 多核心 11399 分，單核心 2734 分，多核心與 Ultra 5 125H 相近，單核心表現良好。Cinebench R23 多核心 14871 分，單核心 1881 分，多核心略高於 Ultra 5 125H。Cinebench 2024 多核心 808 分，單核心 115 分，多核心略低於 Ultra 5 125H。PassMark 多執行緒 28142 分，單執行緒 3986 分，多執行緒表現優於 Ultra 5 125H，單執行緒分數接近 Ultra 9 185H。總體而言，在 45W 功耗下，13900HK 的多核心效能超越第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心效能可與第一代 Ultra 9 185H 匹敵。

網路、遊戲與 AI 效能

作者還測試了網路效能，OpenWRT 測試顯示 AES 766851 分，chacha20 415379 分，CoreMark 411275 分，CoreMark 略低於 MS-01 的 13900H 和 Ultra 5 125H。WiFi 6E (聯發科 MT7922) 測試速度約 700 Mbps。2.5G 網卡使用 iperf3 測試，單執行緒和多執行緒上下行速度均接近 2.35 Gbit/s，達到滿速，且無兼容性問題。

遊戲效能方面，使用 Iris Xe 核顯 (96EU) 進行測試。《英雄聯盟》在 1080p 高畫質下，大團戰平均約 100 幀。《原神》在 1080p 中畫質下，跑圖戰鬥約 50 幀。在 AI 模型運算方面，跑大模型測試 Snake Programming 結果為 7.45 tok/s，而測試 Qwen 330BA3BQ4 量化模型時，速度達到了 10 tok/s，表現相當不錯。

顯示輸出與儲存效能

GEEKOM Core IT13 的顯示輸出能力強勁，HDMI 介面最高支援 4K 60Hz 8-bit RGB 輸出，而 USB4 介面輸出 DP 訊號，最高可支援 4K 144Hz 8-bit RGB。若顯示器支援超頻，USB4 介面甚至可支援 4K 160Hz 輸出。作者成功將主機連接到 Sony OLED 電視，實現 4K 60Hz 8-bit RGB 輸出。此外，Intel Iris Xe 核顯支援硬體解碼，可流暢播放本地或 YouTube 的 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片。

儲存效能方面，原廠 NVMe 硬碟測試速度約 4000MB/s，符合 PCIe 4.0x4 的入門水準。USB4 外接儲存測試速度約 3100MB/s，表現良好。作者也驗證了雙 USB4 介面同時連接高刷新率顯示器和外接硬碟時的兼容性，未發現問題。

功耗、溫度與噪音

在室溫 28 度下，Core IT13 在 Windows 效能模式下的功耗測試結果為：CPU 待機溫度 46 度，SSD 待機溫度 33 度。待機整機功耗最低僅 7.3W，CPU 滿載時溫度最高約 90 度。CPU 滿載時的噪音約 55 分貝，靠近耳邊約 44 分貝。在平衡模式下 (35W 功耗釋放) 和靜音模式下 (20W 功耗釋放) 單烤 FPU，功耗和噪音都會相應降低。

總結

作者總結表示，GEEKOM Core IT13 搭載 i9-13900HK CPU，在原廠預設的 45W 效能釋放下，多核心效能高於第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心效能接近第一代 Ultra 9 185H。它擁有經典的 Intel NUC 外形，體積小巧，做工精良。具備四個 4K 顯示輸出介面和三個儲存介面，擴充性良好。雖然只有單一 2.5G 網路孔，但憑藉豐富的儲存介面，可以作為一個不錯的家庭網路伺服器。如果搭配 USB4 轉 10G 網路卡或連接 USB4 硬碟陣列，甚至可以構建經典的 All-in-one 網路伺服器。作者認為這款迷你主機散熱和靜音穩定，兼容性好，對於需要 Intel CPU 迷你主機的用戶來說，是不錯的選擇。

================================================

# Intro

It can support four 4K display outputs at the same time. There are also three storage interfaces,. The latest Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantitative model can also run at. 10tok/s. It's so small that you. can hold it in one hand. Hello, I'm Laobai. Today we. will introduce the GEEKOM core IT132025 version of. Intel's. 13th generation i913900HK high-performance small mainframe. The 13th generation i9 Intel mobile CPU. is still the mainstream top product in Intel's. mini mainframe. Although the first generation Ultra and even the second generation Ultra CPU have been released,. their prices are still high. If you want to buy a mini console with Intel CPU now,. do you think you. should buy the 13th generation Core or the first generation Ultra last year? Or the second generation Ultra, which is now fresh on the market. Core IT132025 is equipped. with Intel IrisXe core display dual-channel DDR4 memory. of Intel. i913900HK14-core 20-thread standard pressure mobile CPU 96EU. 3200 MHz, three storage interfaces,. four screen display output,. 2.5g network card. and WiFi 6E.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look.

The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cable, HDMI Cable,. Monitor Back. Rack. and Screw Instructions. This small power supply is 19 volts and 6.32 amperes. with a total power of 120 watts.

The small mainframe has a metal middle frame and a bottom cover. and a plastic body and an upper cover. On the upper cover, there is an English sign of the core.

Body interface front panel:. dual USB3.2A ports,. 10Gbps headset interface power switch key.

Rear panel: 19V power interface. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP signals. HDMI 2.0 interface. 2.5g network interface. USB3.2aa port. USB2.0 interface. another USB4 interface that can output DP signals. and another HDMI 2.0 interface. Side panel: SD card slot with vents. on both sides and rear.

Loosen (with bare hands) the 4 screws on the foot pad of the bottom cover. This is the way to open the lid of the classic shape of Intel NUC. Gently lift the cover. and note the cable connection. Let's take a look at the internal interfaces. Dual-channel DDR43 200 MHz memory. M. 2 PCIe 4.0X4's nvme interface M. 2 SATA interface The SATA interface can be connected to a 2. 5-inch SSD on the backplane. Remove the nvmeSSD. Below. is the SD card slot and the MT7922WiFi6E wireless card.

# 稳定度与性能测试

On the front page of the BIOS. you can see that 32g DDR43 200 MHz memory has been installed.

There. are. performance release options, including silent 20W,. balanced 35W and performance 45W. We chose a 45 watt performance release for this test. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. We opened the pressure test of. AIDA64 running FPU single baking,. and the CPU power consumption dropped from 54 watts to 45 watts. The power consumption of the whole machine dropped from 75 watts to 65 watts,. and the CPU frequency was stable at an average of 3 GHz. We've been baking alone for an hour and 19 minutes. 13900HK power consumption has been maintained at 45W. CPU temperature up to 96. SSD temperature up to 40.

Let's use the i913900HKCPU. of the IT13 mini host to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result is 13 minutes and 2 seconds. a total of 782 seconds. which is lower than CPU of Ultra Generation I and II. CPUZ Multi-threaded 7083.7 Single-threaded 782.8 Multi-threaded. beyond. the first generation Ultra5125H Single-threaded performance close to. the first generation Ultra9. The reason is that we have set the best performance. in the system power mode. It is said that it is only effective for the 13th generation i9 CPU. Geekbench 5 Multi-Core 11302 Single Core. 1942 Multi-Core Performance. Outperforms First-Generation Ultra5 125H Single Core. Outperforms First-Generation Ultra9. Geekbench 6 multi-core 11399. single core 2734. multi-core performance is only equal to Ultra5125H. it seems that DDR4 is lagging behind. Single-core performance is good. second only to the second-generation Ultra9285 HCinebench R23. multi-core 14871.

single-core 1881. Multi-core performance is slightly higher. than Ultra5125 HCinebnech2024 multi-core 808,. single-core 115,. Multi-core performance is also lower than. Ultra5125 HPassMark multi-threaded 28142 single-threaded 3986 multi-threaded performance is better. than Ultra5125H. Many single-thread scores are close. to Ultra9185H. On the whole. the multi-threaded performance of 13900HK. which only has 45 watts of performance. surpasses that of the first generation Ultra5125H. Single-threaded performance is comparable to the first generation Ultra9185H. Then look at. the entertainment master's total score of. 1152236 CPU score 604832. We ran openWRT test. on the i913900HK. AES766851chacha20415379CoreMark411275. is. slightly lower than. MS-01's 13900H. and Ultra5125H in.

CoreMark performance.

# 图形与游戏性能

Then let's play games. League of Legends: 1080p High Quality. The average frame of the final big group battle is about 100 frames.

Genshin: 1080p medium picture quality. about 50 frames when running and fighting. This is the game experience brought. by 96EUIrisXe nuclear display.

We also let IT1313900HK. test the big model running snake programming,. and the final result. is 7.45tok/s,. which is good to run. However,. it is gratifying that the test Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantitative model runs. at 10tok/s,. which is very good.

# 显示存储网络

The display output. HDMI interface. supports up to 4K60 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output,. and the USB4 interface outputs. DP signal. Up to 4K 144 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor supports. DP interface overclocking to 160 Hz. After overclocking,. USB4 interface. can support 4K 160 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Sony. OLED. TV connected HDMI cable display output 4K 60 Hz 8 bit RGB signal. Let's take a look at the strengths of Intel's IrisXe core display. video decoding. It can hardwire up to local 8K 60 frames of AV1 video.

Youtube 8K 60 frame AV1 video still plays. smoothly.

Factory nvme drives test 4000MB/s,. which is. the entry level for PCIe 4.0X4. USB4 interface storage performance test 3100MB/s,. which is. a good performance of USB4 external storage. At this time, our other USB4 interface is connected. to a high-brush monitor,. indicating that our dual USB4 interface has. no compatibility problems. Wi-Fi test This time. it was the MediaTek MT7922 WiFi6E wireless card that ran at 700 megabits per second,. which is. a good category in my wireless network. environment. We also used iperf3 to test the performance. of. the 2.5g network card,. and both single-threaded upload and download and multi-threaded upload and download are. close to 2. 35 G.Running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

Core IT132025 Mini Console Installed with. 13th Generation Core i9 CPU 13900 HK45W Performance Release. Under Windows Power Consumption Performance. We List to LargeLook. at home. The maximum power consumption of CPU is only 90 watts. and the maximum power consumption of standby is only 7.3 watts. Small 120W DC power supply makes it easy. When the room temperature is 28 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 46 degrees. SSD standby temperature 33 degrees. This small mainframe productivity test is about 55 decibels. when the CPU is fully loaded. Retracted to the ear is 44 decibels.

We also set the balance mode and the silent mode. each running the FPU single roast. 35W CPU performance release in equalized mode. and 20W CPU performance release in silent mode.

# 最后总结

Core IT132025 Mini PC is equipped with. i913900HK Intel CPU factory 45W performance release. The multi-core performance is higher. than first-generation Ultra5125H,. and the single-core performance is close to the first-generation Ultra9185H. It is similar to. the classic shape of Intel NUC,. with four 4K display output interfaces and three storage interfaces inside the fuselage. The interface is quite good. The disadvantage is that a single 2.5g network port. can be used as a good home network server. with three storage interfaces. if there are dual 2.5g network ports. Of course,. it can also add a USB4 to 10 Gigabit network port,. and another USB4 is connected. to the lightning hard disk cabinet. This makes it a classic Allinone web server. To sum up,. the factory's 45-watt performance release,. heat dissipation and silence are stable,. with four sets of display output interfaces and three sets. of storage interfaces. Compatibility is good. It has the classic shape of Intel NUC. small and exquisite. one hand can hold. the workmanship is very good. Don't miss it if you need. Intel CPU mini host. All right. that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching. Goodbye.

item.description:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解搭載 Intel i9-13900HK 高效能處理器的 GEEKOM Core IT13 迷你主機的實際表現。
  • 比較該主機在各種基準測試（CPUZ、Geekbench、Cinebench、PassMark）中的多核心與單核心效能，並與第一代及第二代 Intel Ultra 處理器進行對比。
  • 了解這款迷你主機在多顯示輸出、儲存擴充、網路（包括 2.5G 與 WiFi 6E）、遊戲、甚至 AI 模型運算方面的具體能力與測試結果。

摘要

作者 Laobai 在本期影片中，為觀眾介紹了 GEEKOM Core IT13 迷你主機的 2025 版本，這款主機搭載了 Intel 第 13 代的 i9-13900HK 高效能移動版處理器。儘管 Intel 已推出新一代的 Ultra 處理器，但 13 代 i9 仍是目前迷你主機市場上的主流頂級配置之一。作者探討了在當前時間點，選擇 13 代 Core 處理器或新款 Ultra 處理器的考量點。

GEEKOM Core IT13 配備了 14 核心 20 執行緒的 i9-13900HK 處理器、Intel Iris Xe 內建顯示晶片 (96EU)、雙通道 DDR4 3200MHz 記憶體、三個儲存介面、四個螢幕顯示輸出、2.5G 網路卡和 WiFi 6E。開箱配件包括電源線、HDMI 線、顯示器背掛架等。主機採用金屬中框和底蓋，搭配塑膠機身和上蓋，體積小巧。

主機的介面配置豐富，前面板有雙 USB 3.2 A (10Gbps) 埠和耳機孔，後面板則有電源介面、兩個支援 DP 輸出的 USB4 介面、兩個 HDMI 2.0 介面、一個 2.5G 網路孔、一個 USB 3.2 A 埠和一個 USB 2.0 埠。側邊還有一個 SD 讀卡機。其經典的開啟方式與 Intel NUC 相似，透過鬆開底部螺絲即可打開。

內部配置與效能設定

打開機身後，可以看到雙通道的 DDR4 記憶體插槽、一個 M.2 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 介面和一個 M.2 SATA 介面，底板上還可以安裝一個 2.5 吋 SSD。作者展示了已安裝好的 32GB DDR4 記憶體。在 BIOS 中，提供了靜音 (20W)、平衡 (35W) 和效能 (45W) 三種功耗釋放選項。本次測試選擇了預設的 45W 效能釋放模式。

穩定性與基準效能測試

作者進行了 AIDA64 FPU 單烤壓力測試，在 45W 功耗釋放下，CPU 功耗穩定在 45W，整機功耗約 65W，CPU 平均頻率約 3 GHz，烤機一小時十九分鐘後，CPU 最高溫度達到 96 度，SSD 最高溫度 40 度，表現穩定。

影片轉碼測試中，13900HK 完成任務耗時 13 分 2 秒（782 秒）。CPU 基準測試部分：CPUZ 多核心 7083.7 分，單核心 782.8 分，多核心超越第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心接近第一代 Ultra 9。Geekbench 5 多核心 11302 分，單核心 1942 分，多核心領先第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心領先第一代 Ultra 9。Geekbench 6 多核心 11399 分，單核心 2734 分，多核心與 Ultra 5 125H 相近，單核心表現良好。Cinebench R23 多核心 14871 分，單核心 1881 分，多核心略高於 Ultra 5 125H。Cinebench 2024 多核心 808 分，單核心 115 分，多核心略低於 Ultra 5 125H。PassMark 多執行緒 28142 分，單執行緒 3986 分，多執行緒表現優於 Ultra 5 125H，單執行緒分數接近 Ultra 9 185H。總體而言，在 45W 功耗下，13900HK 的多核心效能超越第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心效能可與第一代 Ultra 9 185H 匹敵。

網路、遊戲與 AI 效能

作者還測試了網路效能，OpenWRT 測試顯示 AES 766851 分，chacha20 415379 分，CoreMark 411275 分，CoreMark 略低於 MS-01 的 13900H 和 Ultra 5 125H。WiFi 6E (聯發科 MT7922) 測試速度約 700 Mbps。2.5G 網卡使用 iperf3 測試，單執行緒和多執行緒上下行速度均接近 2.35 Gbit/s，達到滿速，且無兼容性問題。

遊戲效能方面，使用 Iris Xe 核顯 (96EU) 進行測試。《英雄聯盟》在 1080p 高畫質下，大團戰平均約 100 幀。《原神》在 1080p 中畫質下，跑圖戰鬥約 50 幀。在 AI 模型運算方面，跑大模型測試 Snake Programming 結果為 7.45 tok/s，而測試 Qwen 330BA3BQ4 量化模型時，速度達到了 10 tok/s，表現相當不錯。

顯示輸出與儲存效能

GEEKOM Core IT13 的顯示輸出能力強勁，HDMI 介面最高支援 4K 60Hz 8-bit RGB 輸出，而 USB4 介面輸出 DP 訊號，最高可支援 4K 144Hz 8-bit RGB。若顯示器支援超頻，USB4 介面甚至可支援 4K 160Hz 輸出。作者成功將主機連接到 Sony OLED 電視，實現 4K 60Hz 8-bit RGB 輸出。此外，Intel Iris Xe 核顯支援硬體解碼，可流暢播放本地或 YouTube 的 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片。

儲存效能方面，原廠 NVMe 硬碟測試速度約 4000MB/s，符合 PCIe 4.0x4 的入門水準。USB4 外接儲存測試速度約 3100MB/s，表現良好。作者也驗證了雙 USB4 介面同時連接高刷新率顯示器和外接硬碟時的兼容性，未發現問題。

功耗、溫度與噪音

在室溫 28 度下，Core IT13 在 Windows 效能模式下的功耗測試結果為：CPU 待機溫度 46 度，SSD 待機溫度 33 度。待機整機功耗最低僅 7.3W，CPU 滿載時溫度最高約 90 度。CPU 滿載時的噪音約 55 分貝，靠近耳邊約 44 分貝。在平衡模式下 (35W 功耗釋放) 和靜音模式下 (20W 功耗釋放) 單烤 FPU，功耗和噪音都會相應降低。

總結

作者總結表示，GEEKOM Core IT13 搭載 i9-13900HK CPU，在原廠預設的 45W 效能釋放下，多核心效能高於第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心效能接近第一代 Ultra 9 185H。它擁有經典的 Intel NUC 外形，體積小巧，做工精良。具備四個 4K 顯示輸出介面和三個儲存介面，擴充性良好。雖然只有單一 2.5G 網路孔，但憑藉豐富的儲存介面，可以作為一個不錯的家庭網路伺服器。如果搭配 USB4 轉 10G 網路卡或連接 USB4 硬碟陣列，甚至可以構建經典的 All-in-one 網路伺服器。作者認為這款迷你主機散熱和靜音穩定，兼容性好，對於需要 Intel CPU 迷你主機的用戶來說，是不錯的選擇。

================================================

# Intro

It can support four 4K display outputs at the same time. There are also three storage interfaces,. The latest Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantitative model can also run at. 10tok/s. It's so small that you. can hold it in one hand. Hello, I'm Laobai. Today we. will introduce the GEEKOM core IT132025 version of. Intel's. 13th generation i913900HK high-performance small mainframe. The 13th generation i9 Intel mobile CPU. is still the mainstream top product in Intel's. mini mainframe. Although the first generation Ultra and even the second generation Ultra CPU have been released,. their prices are still high. If you want to buy a mini console with Intel CPU now,. do you think you. should buy the 13th generation Core or the first generation Ultra last year? Or the second generation Ultra, which is now fresh on the market. Core IT132025 is equipped. with Intel IrisXe core display dual-channel DDR4 memory. of Intel. i913900HK14-core 20-thread standard pressure mobile CPU 96EU. 3200 MHz, three storage interfaces,. four screen display output,. 2.5g network card. and WiFi 6E.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look.

The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cable, HDMI Cable,. Monitor Back. Rack. and Screw Instructions. This small power supply is 19 volts and 6.32 amperes. with a total power of 120 watts.

The small mainframe has a metal middle frame and a bottom cover. and a plastic body and an upper cover. On the upper cover, there is an English sign of the core.

Body interface front panel:. dual USB3.2A ports,. 10Gbps headset interface power switch key.

Rear panel: 19V power interface. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP signals. HDMI 2.0 interface. 2.5g network interface. USB3.2aa port. USB2.0 interface. another USB4 interface that can output DP signals. and another HDMI 2.0 interface. Side panel: SD card slot with vents. on both sides and rear.

Loosen (with bare hands) the 4 screws on the foot pad of the bottom cover. This is the way to open the lid of the classic shape of Intel NUC. Gently lift the cover. and note the cable connection. Let's take a look at the internal interfaces. Dual-channel DDR43 200 MHz memory. M. 2 PCIe 4.0X4's nvme interface M. 2 SATA interface The SATA interface can be connected to a 2. 5-inch SSD on the backplane. Remove the nvmeSSD. Below. is the SD card slot and the MT7922WiFi6E wireless card.

# 稳定度与性能测试

On the front page of the BIOS. you can see that 32g DDR43 200 MHz memory has been installed.

There. are. performance release options, including silent 20W,. balanced 35W and performance 45W. We chose a 45 watt performance release for this test. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. We opened the pressure test of. AIDA64 running FPU single baking,. and the CPU power consumption dropped from 54 watts to 45 watts. The power consumption of the whole machine dropped from 75 watts to 65 watts,. and the CPU frequency was stable at an average of 3 GHz. We've been baking alone for an hour and 19 minutes. 13900HK power consumption has been maintained at 45W. CPU temperature up to 96. SSD temperature up to 40.

Let's use the i913900HKCPU. of the IT13 mini host to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result is 13 minutes and 2 seconds. a total of 782 seconds. which is lower than CPU of Ultra Generation I and II. CPUZ Multi-threaded 7083.7 Single-threaded 782.8 Multi-threaded. beyond. the first generation Ultra5125H Single-threaded performance close to. the first generation Ultra9. The reason is that we have set the best performance. in the system power mode. It is said that it is only effective for the 13th generation i9 CPU. Geekbench 5 Multi-Core 11302 Single Core. 1942 Multi-Core Performance. Outperforms First-Generation Ultra5 125H Single Core. Outperforms First-Generation Ultra9. Geekbench 6 multi-core 11399. single core 2734. multi-core performance is only equal to Ultra5125H. it seems that DDR4 is lagging behind. Single-core performance is good. second only to the second-generation Ultra9285 HCinebench R23. multi-core 14871.

single-core 1881. Multi-core performance is slightly higher. than Ultra5125 HCinebnech2024 multi-core 808,. single-core 115,. Multi-core performance is also lower than. Ultra5125 HPassMark multi-threaded 28142 single-threaded 3986 multi-threaded performance is better. than Ultra5125H. Many single-thread scores are close. to Ultra9185H. On the whole. the multi-threaded performance of 13900HK. which only has 45 watts of performance. surpasses that of the first generation Ultra5125H. Single-threaded performance is comparable to the first generation Ultra9185H. Then look at. the entertainment master's total score of. 1152236 CPU score 604832. We ran openWRT test. on the i913900HK. AES766851chacha20415379CoreMark411275. is. slightly lower than. MS-01's 13900H. and Ultra5125H in.

CoreMark performance.

# 图形与游戏性能

Then let's play games. League of Legends: 1080p High Quality. The average frame of the final big group battle is about 100 frames.

Genshin: 1080p medium picture quality. about 50 frames when running and fighting. This is the game experience brought. by 96EUIrisXe nuclear display.

We also let IT1313900HK. test the big model running snake programming,. and the final result. is 7.45tok/s,. which is good to run. However,. it is gratifying that the test Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantitative model runs. at 10tok/s,. which is very good.

# 显示存储网络

The display output. HDMI interface. supports up to 4K60 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output,. and the USB4 interface outputs. DP signal. Up to 4K 144 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor supports. DP interface overclocking to 160 Hz. After overclocking,. USB4 interface. can support 4K 160 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Sony. OLED. TV connected HDMI cable display output 4K 60 Hz 8 bit RGB signal. Let's take a look at the strengths of Intel's IrisXe core display. video decoding. It can hardwire up to local 8K 60 frames of AV1 video.

Youtube 8K 60 frame AV1 video still plays. smoothly.

Factory nvme drives test 4000MB/s,. which is. the entry level for PCIe 4.0X4. USB4 interface storage performance test 3100MB/s,. which is. a good performance of USB4 external storage. At this time, our other USB4 interface is connected. to a high-brush monitor,. indicating that our dual USB4 interface has. no compatibility problems. Wi-Fi test This time. it was the MediaTek MT7922 WiFi6E wireless card that ran at 700 megabits per second,. which is. a good category in my wireless network. environment. We also used iperf3 to test the performance. of. the 2.5g network card,. and both single-threaded upload and download and multi-threaded upload and download are. close to 2. 35 G.Running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

Core IT132025 Mini Console Installed with. 13th Generation Core i9 CPU 13900 HK45W Performance Release. Under Windows Power Consumption Performance. We List to LargeLook. at home. The maximum power consumption of CPU is only 90 watts. and the maximum power consumption of standby is only 7.3 watts. Small 120W DC power supply makes it easy. When the room temperature is 28 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 46 degrees. SSD standby temperature 33 degrees. This small mainframe productivity test is about 55 decibels. when the CPU is fully loaded. Retracted to the ear is 44 decibels.

We also set the balance mode and the silent mode. each running the FPU single roast. 35W CPU performance release in equalized mode. and 20W CPU performance release in silent mode.

# 最后总结

Core IT132025 Mini PC is equipped with. i913900HK Intel CPU factory 45W performance release. The multi-core performance is higher. than first-generation Ultra5125H,. and the single-core performance is close to the first-generation Ultra9185H. It is similar to. the classic shape of Intel NUC,. with four 4K display output interfaces and three storage interfaces inside the fuselage. The interface is quite good. The disadvantage is that a single 2.5g network port. can be used as a good home network server. with three storage interfaces. if there are dual 2.5g network ports. Of course,. it can also add a USB4 to 10 Gigabit network port,. and another USB4 is connected. to the lightning hard disk cabinet. This makes it a classic Allinone web server. To sum up,. the factory's 45-watt performance release,. heat dissipation and silence are stable,. with four sets of display output interfaces and three sets. of storage interfaces. Compatibility is good. It has the classic shape of Intel NUC. small and exquisite. one hand can hold. the workmanship is very good. Don't miss it if you need. Intel CPU mini host. All right. that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching. Goodbye.

item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解搭載 Intel i9-13900HK 高效能處理器的 GEEKOM Core IT13 迷你主機的實際表現。
  • 比較該主機在各種基準測試（CPUZ、Geekbench、Cinebench、PassMark）中的多核心與單核心效能，並與第一代及第二代 Intel Ultra 處理器進行對比。
  • 了解這款迷你主機在多顯示輸出、儲存擴充、網路（包括 2.5G 與 WiFi 6E）、遊戲、甚至 AI 模型運算方面的具體能力與測試結果。

摘要

作者 Laobai 在本期影片中，為觀眾介紹了 GEEKOM Core IT13 迷你主機的 2025 版本，這款主機搭載了 Intel 第 13 代的 i9-13900HK 高效能移動版處理器。儘管 Intel 已推出新一代的 Ultra 處理器，但 13 代 i9 仍是目前迷你主機市場上的主流頂級配置之一。作者探討了在當前時間點，選擇 13 代 Core 處理器或新款 Ultra 處理器的考量點。

GEEKOM Core IT13 配備了 14 核心 20 執行緒的 i9-13900HK 處理器、Intel Iris Xe 內建顯示晶片 (96EU)、雙通道 DDR4 3200MHz 記憶體、三個儲存介面、四個螢幕顯示輸出、2.5G 網路卡和 WiFi 6E。開箱配件包括電源線、HDMI 線、顯示器背掛架等。主機採用金屬中框和底蓋，搭配塑膠機身和上蓋，體積小巧。

主機的介面配置豐富，前面板有雙 USB 3.2 A (10Gbps) 埠和耳機孔，後面板則有電源介面、兩個支援 DP 輸出的 USB4 介面、兩個 HDMI 2.0 介面、一個 2.5G 網路孔、一個 USB 3.2 A 埠和一個 USB 2.0 埠。側邊還有一個 SD 讀卡機。其經典的開啟方式與 Intel NUC 相似，透過鬆開底部螺絲即可打開。

內部配置與效能設定

打開機身後，可以看到雙通道的 DDR4 記憶體插槽、一個 M.2 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 介面和一個 M.2 SATA 介面，底板上還可以安裝一個 2.5 吋 SSD。作者展示了已安裝好的 32GB DDR4 記憶體。在 BIOS 中，提供了靜音 (20W)、平衡 (35W) 和效能 (45W) 三種功耗釋放選項。本次測試選擇了預設的 45W 效能釋放模式。

穩定性與基準效能測試

作者進行了 AIDA64 FPU 單烤壓力測試，在 45W 功耗釋放下，CPU 功耗穩定在 45W，整機功耗約 65W，CPU 平均頻率約 3 GHz，烤機一小時十九分鐘後，CPU 最高溫度達到 96 度，SSD 最高溫度 40 度，表現穩定。

影片轉碼測試中，13900HK 完成任務耗時 13 分 2 秒（782 秒）。CPU 基準測試部分：CPUZ 多核心 7083.7 分，單核心 782.8 分，多核心超越第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心接近第一代 Ultra 9。Geekbench 5 多核心 11302 分，單核心 1942 分，多核心領先第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心領先第一代 Ultra 9。Geekbench 6 多核心 11399 分，單核心 2734 分，多核心與 Ultra 5 125H 相近，單核心表現良好。Cinebench R23 多核心 14871 分，單核心 1881 分，多核心略高於 Ultra 5 125H。Cinebench 2024 多核心 808 分，單核心 115 分，多核心略低於 Ultra 5 125H。PassMark 多執行緒 28142 分，單執行緒 3986 分，多執行緒表現優於 Ultra 5 125H，單執行緒分數接近 Ultra 9 185H。總體而言，在 45W 功耗下，13900HK 的多核心效能超越第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心效能可與第一代 Ultra 9 185H 匹敵。

網路、遊戲與 AI 效能

作者還測試了網路效能，OpenWRT 測試顯示 AES 766851 分，chacha20 415379 分，CoreMark 411275 分，CoreMark 略低於 MS-01 的 13900H 和 Ultra 5 125H。WiFi 6E (聯發科 MT7922) 測試速度約 700 Mbps。2.5G 網卡使用 iperf3 測試，單執行緒和多執行緒上下行速度均接近 2.35 Gbit/s，達到滿速，且無兼容性問題。

遊戲效能方面，使用 Iris Xe 核顯 (96EU) 進行測試。《英雄聯盟》在 1080p 高畫質下，大團戰平均約 100 幀。《原神》在 1080p 中畫質下，跑圖戰鬥約 50 幀。在 AI 模型運算方面，跑大模型測試 Snake Programming 結果為 7.45 tok/s，而測試 Qwen 330BA3BQ4 量化模型時，速度達到了 10 tok/s，表現相當不錯。

顯示輸出與儲存效能

GEEKOM Core IT13 的顯示輸出能力強勁，HDMI 介面最高支援 4K 60Hz 8-bit RGB 輸出，而 USB4 介面輸出 DP 訊號，最高可支援 4K 144Hz 8-bit RGB。若顯示器支援超頻，USB4 介面甚至可支援 4K 160Hz 輸出。作者成功將主機連接到 Sony OLED 電視，實現 4K 60Hz 8-bit RGB 輸出。此外，Intel Iris Xe 核顯支援硬體解碼，可流暢播放本地或 YouTube 的 8K 60 幀 AV1 影片。

儲存效能方面，原廠 NVMe 硬碟測試速度約 4000MB/s，符合 PCIe 4.0x4 的入門水準。USB4 外接儲存測試速度約 3100MB/s，表現良好。作者也驗證了雙 USB4 介面同時連接高刷新率顯示器和外接硬碟時的兼容性，未發現問題。

功耗、溫度與噪音

在室溫 28 度下，Core IT13 在 Windows 效能模式下的功耗測試結果為：CPU 待機溫度 46 度，SSD 待機溫度 33 度。待機整機功耗最低僅 7.3W，CPU 滿載時溫度最高約 90 度。CPU 滿載時的噪音約 55 分貝，靠近耳邊約 44 分貝。在平衡模式下 (35W 功耗釋放) 和靜音模式下 (20W 功耗釋放) 單烤 FPU，功耗和噪音都會相應降低。

總結

作者總結表示，GEEKOM Core IT13 搭載 i9-13900HK CPU，在原廠預設的 45W 效能釋放下，多核心效能高於第一代 Ultra 5 125H，單核心效能接近第一代 Ultra 9 185H。它擁有經典的 Intel NUC 外形，體積小巧，做工精良。具備四個 4K 顯示輸出介面和三個儲存介面，擴充性良好。雖然只有單一 2.5G 網路孔，但憑藉豐富的儲存介面，可以作為一個不錯的家庭網路伺服器。如果搭配 USB4 轉 10G 網路卡或連接 USB4 硬碟陣列，甚至可以構建經典的 All-in-one 網路伺服器。作者認為這款迷你主機散熱和靜音穩定，兼容性好，對於需要 Intel CPU 迷你主機的用戶來說，是不錯的選擇。

================================================

# Intro

It can support four 4K display outputs at the same time. There are also three storage interfaces,. The latest Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantitative model can also run at. 10tok/s. It's so small that you. can hold it in one hand. Hello, I'm Laobai. Today we. will introduce the GEEKOM core IT132025 version of. Intel's. 13th generation i913900HK high-performance small mainframe. The 13th generation i9 Intel mobile CPU. is still the mainstream top product in Intel's. mini mainframe. Although the first generation Ultra and even the second generation Ultra CPU have been released,. their prices are still high. If you want to buy a mini console with Intel CPU now,. do you think you. should buy the 13th generation Core or the first generation Ultra last year? Or the second generation Ultra, which is now fresh on the market. Core IT132025 is equipped. with Intel IrisXe core display dual-channel DDR4 memory. of Intel. i913900HK14-core 20-thread standard pressure mobile CPU 96EU. 3200 MHz, three storage interfaces,. four screen display output,. 2.5g network card. and WiFi 6E.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look.

The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cable, HDMI Cable,. Monitor Back. Rack. and Screw Instructions. This small power supply is 19 volts and 6.32 amperes. with a total power of 120 watts.

The small mainframe has a metal middle frame and a bottom cover. and a plastic body and an upper cover. On the upper cover, there is an English sign of the core.

Body interface front panel:. dual USB3.2A ports,. 10Gbps headset interface power switch key.

Rear panel: 19V power interface. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP signals. HDMI 2.0 interface. 2.5g network interface. USB3.2aa port. USB2.0 interface. another USB4 interface that can output DP signals. and another HDMI 2.0 interface. Side panel: SD card slot with vents. on both sides and rear.

Loosen (with bare hands) the 4 screws on the foot pad of the bottom cover. This is the way to open the lid of the classic shape of Intel NUC. Gently lift the cover. and note the cable connection. Let's take a look at the internal interfaces. Dual-channel DDR43 200 MHz memory. M. 2 PCIe 4.0X4's nvme interface M. 2 SATA interface The SATA interface can be connected to a 2. 5-inch SSD on the backplane. Remove the nvmeSSD. Below. is the SD card slot and the MT7922WiFi6E wireless card.

# 稳定度与性能测试

On the front page of the BIOS. you can see that 32g DDR43 200 MHz memory has been installed.

There. are. performance release options, including silent 20W,. balanced 35W and performance 45W. We chose a 45 watt performance release for this test. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. We opened the pressure test of. AIDA64 running FPU single baking,. and the CPU power consumption dropped from 54 watts to 45 watts. The power consumption of the whole machine dropped from 75 watts to 65 watts,. and the CPU frequency was stable at an average of 3 GHz. We've been baking alone for an hour and 19 minutes. 13900HK power consumption has been maintained at 45W. CPU temperature up to 96. SSD temperature up to 40.

Let's use the i913900HKCPU. of the IT13 mini host to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result is 13 minutes and 2 seconds. a total of 782 seconds. which is lower than CPU of Ultra Generation I and II. CPUZ Multi-threaded 7083.7 Single-threaded 782.8 Multi-threaded. beyond. the first generation Ultra5125H Single-threaded performance close to. the first generation Ultra9. The reason is that we have set the best performance. in the system power mode. It is said that it is only effective for the 13th generation i9 CPU. Geekbench 5 Multi-Core 11302 Single Core. 1942 Multi-Core Performance. Outperforms First-Generation Ultra5 125H Single Core. Outperforms First-Generation Ultra9. Geekbench 6 multi-core 11399. single core 2734. multi-core performance is only equal to Ultra5125H. it seems that DDR4 is lagging behind. Single-core performance is good. second only to the second-generation Ultra9285 HCinebench R23. multi-core 14871.

single-core 1881. Multi-core performance is slightly higher. than Ultra5125 HCinebnech2024 multi-core 808,. single-core 115,. Multi-core performance is also lower than. Ultra5125 HPassMark multi-threaded 28142 single-threaded 3986 multi-threaded performance is better. than Ultra5125H. Many single-thread scores are close. to Ultra9185H. On the whole. the multi-threaded performance of 13900HK. which only has 45 watts of performance. surpasses that of the first generation Ultra5125H. Single-threaded performance is comparable to the first generation Ultra9185H. Then look at. the entertainment master's total score of. 1152236 CPU score 604832. We ran openWRT test. on the i913900HK. AES766851chacha20415379CoreMark411275. is. slightly lower than. MS-01's 13900H. and Ultra5125H in.

CoreMark performance.

# 图形与游戏性能

Then let's play games. League of Legends: 1080p High Quality. The average frame of the final big group battle is about 100 frames.

Genshin: 1080p medium picture quality. about 50 frames when running and fighting. This is the game experience brought. by 96EUIrisXe nuclear display.

We also let IT1313900HK. test the big model running snake programming,. and the final result. is 7.45tok/s,. which is good to run. However,. it is gratifying that the test Qwen330BA3BQ4 quantitative model runs. at 10tok/s,. which is very good.

# 显示存储网络

The display output. HDMI interface. supports up to 4K60 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output,. and the USB4 interface outputs. DP signal. Up to 4K 144 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor supports. DP interface overclocking to 160 Hz. After overclocking,. USB4 interface. can support 4K 160 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal output. Sony. OLED. TV connected HDMI cable display output 4K 60 Hz 8 bit RGB signal. Let's take a look at the strengths of Intel's IrisXe core display. video decoding. It can hardwire up to local 8K 60 frames of AV1 video.

Youtube 8K 60 frame AV1 video still plays. smoothly.

Factory nvme drives test 4000MB/s,. which is. the entry level for PCIe 4.0X4. USB4 interface storage performance test 3100MB/s,. which is. a good performance of USB4 external storage. At this time, our other USB4 interface is connected. to a high-brush monitor,. indicating that our dual USB4 interface has. no compatibility problems. Wi-Fi test This time. it was the MediaTek MT7922 WiFi6E wireless card that ran at 700 megabits per second,. which is. a good category in my wireless network. environment. We also used iperf3 to test the performance. of. the 2.5g network card,. and both single-threaded upload and download and multi-threaded upload and download are. close to 2. 35 G.Running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

Core IT132025 Mini Console Installed with. 13th Generation Core i9 CPU 13900 HK45W Performance Release. Under Windows Power Consumption Performance. We List to LargeLook. at home. The maximum power consumption of CPU is only 90 watts. and the maximum power consumption of standby is only 7.3 watts. Small 120W DC power supply makes it easy. When the room temperature is 28 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 46 degrees. SSD standby temperature 33 degrees. This small mainframe productivity test is about 55 decibels. when the CPU is fully loaded. Retracted to the ear is 44 decibels.

We also set the balance mode and the silent mode. each running the FPU single roast. 35W CPU performance release in equalized mode. and 20W CPU performance release in silent mode.

# 最后总结

Core IT132025 Mini PC is equipped with. i913900HK Intel CPU factory 45W performance release. The multi-core performance is higher. than first-generation Ultra5125H,. and the single-core performance is close to the first-generation Ultra9185H. It is similar to. the classic shape of Intel NUC,. with four 4K display output interfaces and three storage interfaces inside the fuselage. The interface is quite good. The disadvantage is that a single 2.5g network port. can be used as a good home network server. with three storage interfaces. if there are dual 2.5g network ports. Of course,. it can also add a USB4 to 10 Gigabit network port,. and another USB4 is connected. to the lightning hard disk cabinet. This makes it a classic Allinone web server. To sum up,. the factory's 45-watt performance release,. heat dissipation and silence are stable,. with four sets of display output interfaces and three sets. of storage interfaces. Compatibility is good. It has the classic shape of Intel NUC. small and exquisite. one hand can hold. the workmanship is very good. Don't miss it if you need. Intel CPU mini host. All right. that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching. Goodbye.
