item.title: 满血Qwen3 235B本地部署15t/s！Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large文生图本地部署！128G内存8060S最强核显！极摩客EVO-X2 AI Max+ 395迷你主机评测！
item.itunes:title: 满血Qwen3 235B本地部署15t/s！Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large文生图本地部署！128G内存8060S最强核显！极摩客EVO-X2 AI Max+ 395迷你主机评测！
item.itunes:author: jack stone
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 擁有目前 mini host 中最強悍的 x86 處理器效能，並在多項基準測試中名列前茅。

  • 搭載史上最強的核心顯示卡 8060S，其性能在迷你主機領域遙遙領先，足以應對部分 AAA 遊戲。

  • 具備高達 128GB 的板載記憶體，實測證明其在本地端順暢運行大型語言模型及文生圖模型的能力。



摘要


前言與硬體規格


影片中，Laobai 向觀眾介紹了 GMK EVO-X2 這款搭載 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 CPU 的高效能迷你電腦。他指出這是目前 x86 迷你主機中效能最為強悍的產品，內建預期在 2025 年出現的行動標準電壓 CPU，其綜合效能超越了作者先前測試過的每一款迷你主機。GMK EVO-X2 最引人注目的特色在於其內建的 8060S 核心顯示卡，其效能是作者測試過的最強核心顯卡的近三倍；同時，它擁有高達 128GB 的板載記憶體和 200GB 的頻寬，這對於在本地端部署大型語言模型提供了強大的硬體基礎。作者也詳細列出了其規格，包含 16 個 Zen5 大核、32 執行緒、40CU 8060S 核心顯示卡、128GB LPDDR5X 8000MHz 記憶體、雙 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe SSD 插槽、四螢幕輸出、2.5G 網路卡及 WiFi 7。




硬體外觀與內部結構


Laobai 開箱展示了主機本體及所有配件，包括電源線、HDMI 線和手冊，並特別提到 230W 的變壓器。主機外殼採用金屬與塑膠拼接設計。作者詳細介紹了前置面板的介面，包含電源開關、效能釋放按鈕、SD 卡槽、支援 DP 輸出功能的 USB4 介面、雙 USB 3.2 Gen2A 連接埠、耳機孔及 LED 燈效切換鈕。後方面板則配置了電源接口、後置音訊接口、2.5G 網路接口、USB 3.2 Gen2A 連接埠、另一個支援 DP 輸出的 USB4 介面、DP 1.4、HDMI 2.1 以及雙 USB 2.0 接口。在散熱設計上，後方為出風口，底部和上方則是進風口。作者也示範了如何拆開頂蓋，展示了內部的後置散熱風扇、板載的 128GB 記憶體，以及兩個 2280 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 插槽（其中一個已安裝 2TB SSD，另一個空閒），以及 WiFi 7 無線網卡。




大型語言模型 (LLM) 本地端部署實測


作為重點測試項目，Laobai 實測了 GMK EVO-X2 在本地端執行 AI 模型的能力。這台主機的 128GB 記憶體可透過 AMD 顯示卡軟體彈性分配，最高可將顯存設為 96GB。記憶體頻寬實測達到 211GB/s。在 Llama3 8B 模型測試中，推理速度為 36.95 tok/s，與 RTX 4060M/4070M 及高配版 M4 Pro Mac mini 相當。Qwen3 14B 模型測試速度為 20.28 tok/s，而 Qwen3 32B 則為 9.61 tok/s (顯存佔用 20GB)。對於 QwenMOE 30B 專家模型 (只需 3B 推理)，速度則高達 52.89 tok/s。作者甚至嘗試載入需要 86GB 或 101GB 記憶體的大型 Qwen3 235B MOE 模型，雖然遇到一些載入問題，但最終在 64GB 顯存分配下，86GB 版本的速度為 14.71 tok/s，101GB 版本為 10.51 tok/s。作者總結，憑藉 128GB 記憶體，EVO-X2 確實能夠運行一般顯示卡無法載入的超大型開源模型，且部分模型的推理速度表現不錯。




文生圖模型 (Text-to-Image) 本地端部署


除了 LLM，作者也測試了文生圖模型的本地端執行。使用了 AMD 推薦的 Amuse (Vincent) 模型，該模型可利用 NPU 加速。簡單模式下的模型顯存佔用少於 4GB。在進階模式中，可以載入更大的模型，如開源最強的 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large (26GB 模型)。作者測試載入該模型，並生成一張 1024x1024 圖片後超分至 2048x2048。最終生成一張圖片耗時約 400 秒（超過 7 分鐘），過程中使用了 33GB 顯存。作者認為，128GB 的大記憶體在本地部署需要大量顯存的文生圖模型方面，展現了其獨特優勢。




綜合性能與基準測試


Laobai 展示了 BIOS 介面，確認了 128GB 記憶體和 8000MHz 頻率，並提供了安靜 (54W)、平衡 (85W) 和效能 (95W) 三種功耗模式選項。所有效能測試均在最強的 95W 模式下進行。作者進行了 AIDA64 FPU 單烤穩定性測試，CPU 功耗穩定在 95W，整機功耗約 154W，CPU 頻率穩定在 3.1GHz，在室溫 32 度下烤機一小時仍保持穩定，CPU 溫度最高 99 度。在視訊轉碼測試中，僅比 i9-14900KF 慢一秒，成績優秀 (406 秒)。



CPU 基準測試結果突出：CPU-Z 多執行緒 15098 (迷你主機中最高)、單執行緒 801；Cinebench R23 多核心 36182 (所有迷你主機排名第一)、單核心 1991；Cinebench 2024 多核心 1829 (所有迷你主機排名第一)、單核心 114；PassMark 多執行緒 59027 (所有迷你主機排名第一)。Geekbench 5/6 多核心也分別位列第三和第二。這些數據證實了 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 在迷你主機領域的頂級 CPU 效能，尤其是在多核心表現上。



在 OpenWRT 的 CoreMark 測試中，得分高達 1058264，這不僅超越了其他所有迷你主機，更是第一台突破百萬分的迷你主機，顯示其在特定工作負載下的高效能。




核心顯示卡 (iGPU) 性能測試與遊戲實測


在核心顯示卡方面，8060S 甜甜圈單烤 GPU 功耗約 120W。3DMark 測試結果令人印象深刻：Time Spy 11696 (高於 RTX 4060M)，Fire Strike 30720 (高於 RTX 4070M 和 4060M)，Steel Nomad Light 83.91 FPS (略高於滿血版 RTX 4060M)。Laobai 強調，這些成績比其他迷你主機中最強的核心顯卡高出近三倍，展現了 8060S 在集成顯示卡領域的巨大飛躍。在《地平線 5》的遊戲實測中，4K 超高畫質、兩倍反鋸齒設定下，普通場景可達 70~80 幀，複雜場景也超過 60 幀。2K 極限畫質下的測試結果在影片截斷前未能完全展示。



================================================

# Intro

It is the most powerful x86 mini host. at present,. with the highly anticipated mobile standard pressure CPU CPU in 2025. Performance outperforms every mini console we've. ever tested. It has its own 8060S core graphics performance,. which is nearly three times that of the strongest core. we have tested. It has 128 gigabytes of onboard memory and 200 gigabytes. of bandwidth,. which is enough for us to deploy the large language model locally. Hello everyone,. I am Laobai,. and today I will introduce to you. the high-performance mini computer GMK EVO-X2. with AMD Ryzen AIMax + 395 CPU. The small host of 128G on-board high-frequency memory device Max +. 395 CPU has finally arrived,. regardless of. the price,. its nuclear display. That is, 40CU 8060S allows. us to play 1080P 3A games. Its 128 gigabytes of memory allows. us to better cope with large language models. So do you pay more attention to the performance of. the core display or the large memory of 128G? Gee-Moke EVO-X2 Device AMD RyzenAIMax + 39516 Zen5 Large Core 32 Thread Standard Pressure Mobile CPU. AMD Radeon 8060S core display board with built-in 40CU. NvmeSSD with. 128GLPDDR5X memory,. 8000MHz dual PCIe 4.0X4 quad-screen display output. 2.5G network card plus WiFi 7.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look. The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cord, HDMI Cable Manual. This power supply 19.5 volts. 11.8. amps total 230 watts. of power.

The shell of the small mainframe is spliced with metal and plastic. Front panel. of fuselage interface: power switch key,. performance release switch button, SD card slot,. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP display signal. Dual USB 3.2 Gen2A port front headset interface,. here is the fan. led. light effect switching button. Back panel:. 19V power connector Rear audio connector Must give a good review. 2.5G network interface, USB3.2Gen2A port,. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP display signal,. DP1.4. interface,. HDMI 2. 1 interface, dual USB 2.0 interface. The rear part is the air outlet,. and the bottom and upper sides. are the air inlets.

To remove these two rubber pads. only four screws on the upper part need to be removed.

Opening the top cover. let's take a look at the interfaces inside. This is. the rear cooling fan,. and the 128G memory is onboard with two sets. of 2280 PCIe 4.0x4nvme connectors already installed. A Viagra Legend9002 TB nvmeSSD is vacant. Another set of. PCIe 4.0 nvmeRZ717WiFi7 wireless cards.

# 本地部署AI模型

Today. let's first test the AI model that everyone is most concerned about. The CPU is Max + 395. and the core display is. 8060S 128 G Memory is divided into two parts,. 64g of. running memory and 64g of dedicated video memory. The video memory allocation function is not in the BIOS,. but in the AMD graphics configuration software. In the Performance menu-Adjust options. here we can set the memory size of the discrete graphics card. up to 96 G. We also tested the memory bandwidth. up to 211GB/s. which is not bad. First of all,. let's run the regular LlaMa3.18B big language model test or snake. programming. 36.95 tok/s is. similar. to the Nvidia single display RTX4060M4070M. we tested. It's also. similar to the 24-gigabyte M4 Pro Mac mini. You should know that the M4 Pro Mac mini is equipped. with 64 gigabytes of memory and 2TB SSD,. which is worth 20,000 yuan! The next test is. the newly released Qwen314B,. which is a reasoning model with. a thinking process. We can also add no _ thinking to turn off. the thought process. The final result is 20.28 tok/s,. For the newly released Qwen332B. note that the video memory has reached 20g. If it is a general single display. the video memory has already exploded. The final result is: 9.61 tok/s. For the above two Qwen314B and 32B,. all the parameters are used together. when reasoning. The next test is that the QwenMOE expert model is loaded with 30 B,.

but the reasoning only. needs 3 B. So the speed is very fast. Video memory usage is still 20g. Final result: 52.89 tok/s. Next, we tested the 70 BLlama model distilled. by DeepSeek,. and the video memory occupation reached 37 G,. which. was really not fast. Only the 5.45 tok/sllama model is not well supported in Chinese. In order to test the limit of. our 128G memory,. we took a look at the Qwen3235BA22BMOE model. However. the standard three-bit quantization of this model requires 111G. and the four-bit quantization requires 142G. We definitely can't support it. So we found the dynamic quantization version of unsloth. His optimized Qwen3235BA22B2 has only 86G bit quantization. The smallest 3-bit quantization is only 101g. I don't know if it's OK. Anyway. download it and test it. First, the video memory was allocated 96 G,. and after restarting,. the test found that the loading would go wrong at the end. I don't know if it's. the model or the LMStudio,. but I can't fix it for a long time. Finally. it returned to the allocation state of 64g memory and 64g video memory. Load the 86 G version of 2-bit quantization. please be sure to modify according to the parameters on the screen. otherwise the speed will be greatly reduced. Video memory occupies 64g. memory occupies 30g. Final result: 14.71 tok/s. It's okay. It's better than I expected. Qwen3235BGPUOffload. loaded with 3-bit quantized 101G version. can be pulled to 89. or 90. Others, please follow our modification.

64G of video memory and 43G. of memory.

The final result is 10.51 tok/s. In these different sizes of. local open source models that we tested,. A 2-bit quantized version. of the maximum Qwen3235BA22 B86G. and a three-bit quantized version of 101 G. are available. Although the speed of use. down only 15 ~ 11tok/sQwen314B. can have 20tok/sQwen332B. Only close to. 10tok/sQwen330BA3B has 52tok/s. I think they're all available. Especially the Qwen330BA3BMOE model is really fast. and good. In addition to having the small host locally deploy the large language model. we also tested locally deploying the text graph model. Amuse Amuse. which is officially recommended by AMD. is able to use NPU to accelerate the Vincent graph. This is the first time I've seen NPU used.

The Wensheng graph model loaded in the simple version is relatively small. occupying less than 4 gigabytes of video memory. When we enter the advanced mode of Amuse. we can download many large models of open source text graphs. The simple model uses SDXL Turbo. which is the first one. It also indicates that we can use Ryzen AI. which is our NPU. Quick drawing, small drawing,. just use it. To be a little more professional,. you need to use the most powerful open source model,. StableDiffusion3.5 Large,. which has 26 gigabytes. Let's try to load it up. It generates a 1024 × 1024 picture. But we can get a big picture. of 2048 × 2048 through super score and give. it a prompt word.

Finally, it took about 400 seconds. to use 33 gigabytes of video memory,. that is, more than 7 minutes to produce a picture.

Local deployment of the large language model and the Wensheng graph model can take full advantage. of the large memory of 128 GB. I think the EVO-X2 is. really good at this point.

# 稳定度与性能测试

128 gigabytes of memory. can be seen on the home page of the BIOS,. and the 8000 MHz. home page. can be modified to release quiet 54 watts and balanced 85 watts. Performance 95 watts. Three options. We chose the strongest performance mode to test,. and we must remember to modify the size. of the video memory here. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. When we opened the pressure test of aida64 running FPU single baking. the CPU slowly declined (from 130 W). running at 95 W. and the power consumption of the whole machine ran to about 154 W. CPU frequency stabilized at 3.1GHz. We baked it for 1 hour and 03 minutes. CPU temperature up to. 99 degrees SSD up to 51 degrees. at room temperature of 32 degrees. Let's use the Ryzen AIMax + 395. CPU of the EVO-X2 mini console to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result was 6 minutes and 46 seconds. a total of 406 seconds and 406 seconds. only one second slower than 14900KF. Very good grades. CPUZ Multithreaded 15098. 3 Single thread 801. 3 Multithreading is currently the highest in the mini host. Top one. Geekbench 5 multi-core. 17502 single-core. 2233 multi-core results ranked third in the mini host. Geekbench 6 Multi-Core 17165. Single Core 2936. Multi-core performance ranked second in the mini host. Cinebench R23 Multi-Core 36182 Single Core 1991 Multi-Core Ranked. First. in All Mini Mainframes. Cine bnech2024 multi-core 1829 single-core 114 multi-core. ranked. first among all mini-consoles. PassMark Multithread 59027 Single Thread 4267 Multithread score is. the first. of all mini hosts. Based on the above comparison,. the AIMax + 395. multi-core performance of the EVO-X2. ranks the highest among all mini hosts. Then look. at. the entertainment master total score 3459253 CPU score 1924213. We ran openWRT test. on RyzenAIMax + 395. AES896076chacha20256799CoreMark1058264.

Surpasses all other mini hosts in. CoreMark performance,. ranking first. This is the first mini console to score 1 million points. N100 million points,. N305 million points,. 8845HS50 million points,. HX37069 million points,. 7945HX91 million points,. Max + 395100!

# 图形与游戏性能

The core display 8060S of. Donut Single Baking GPU Max + 395 runs out of. about 120 watts of power consumption. CPU and GPU with CPUZ Dual Bake Max. + 395 both run out. of 120 watts of power consumption. Run. 3DMark test TimeSpy11696FireStrike30720 SteelNomadLight83. 91FPS stability test with. 97.9% Take. a look through the list. TimeSpy is higher than RTX4060M,. lower than RTX4070M8060S,. and nearly three times higher than other mini hosts with. the highest core display. FireStrike is higher than RTX4070M and 4060M,. and is. still three times higher than highest x86 core display mini console. SteelNomadLight's RTX4060M. which is slightly more than full blood. is three times the size of other top nuclear display mini-consoles. Next to play the game. Horizon 5: 4K super high quality. twice anti-aliasing. Ordinary scene more than 70, close to 80 frames. Complex scene, more than 60 frames.

2K extreme picture quality. double anti-aliasing. Normal scene about 90 frames.

Complex scene, about 80 frames.

Horizon 4: 2K Ultra High Quality with. Twice Anti-Aliasing. No less than 170 frames throughout.

4K super high picture quality. no less than 110 frames in the whole process. very Nice.

Wild Arms 2: The average frame of the evaluation test. of 1080P ultra-high quality operation. is 81 frames. 2K, super high, picture quality.

Average frame 63,. Tomb Raider Shadow: 1080p Highest Quality Running. Evaluation Test Average Frame 133. Frames,. 2K highest quality. average frame 91 frames. Finally, let's test. the Black Myth Wukong 1080P overshoot 55FSR equalization mode. to open the frame generation picture quality customization,. almost all. of which are high. The test result is that the average frame is 136 frames. In actual combat,.

This is the game experience that 8060s. nuclear display brings to us. Let's chart the Tomb Raider shadow test results and compare. them. 8060S is still good. and RTX4060M has its own wins and losses. lower than RTX4070M.

# 显示存储网络

Display output. HDMI 2.1 interface. can output up to 4K120 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal. USB4 and DP interfaces. can output up. to 4K144 Hz 10-bit RGB display signals. Our monitor DP interface can be overclocked. to 160 Hz. After overclocking, this small host can. output 4K 160 Hz 10-bit RGB display signals. Connect Sony OLED. TV HDMI interface to. output 4K 120 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal. Video decoding capability of 8060S core display. It can hardwire local 8K 60 frame AV1 video,. Youtube 8K 60 frame AV1 video smooth playback. The original hard drive tested. 7000MB/s,. which is the highest speed of PCIe 4.0X4. USB4 interface external Thunderbolt hard disk box 3100MB/s,. which is. a good performance of USB4 external storage. At this time, our other USB4 interface is connected. to a high-brush monitor,. indicating that our dual USB4 interface has. no compatibility problems. We also tested the WiFi network card of the small host,. this time the RZ717 WiFi7 wireless network card ran. above 870 megabits per second. It is a good wireless performance in. my wireless network environment. We also used iperf3 to test. the performance of RealTek 2.5G network card. Both single-threaded uploads and downloads. and multi-threaded uploads and downloads have reached nearly 2. 35 G,. which is full of. bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

The AMDRyzenAIMax + 395 CPU of. the EVO-X2 has a performance release of 95 watts under Windows,. and the power consumption performance is listed. for you to see. Up to 220 watts,. standby power consumption is only 7.2 watts. A 230W DC power supply will do the trick. When the room temperature is 30 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 34.2 degrees. SSD standby temperature 34 degrees. When the productivity test CPU is 100%,. the fuselage 61 decibels is placed. at the ear position. 49 decibels. We also tested other performance release modes,. such as. 54 watts in. cool mode and 85 watts. in balanced mode. If you don't have very high performance requirements. it is recommended to use balanced mode or calm mode.

# 最后总结

The EVO-X2 is equipped with AMD Ryzen AIMax + 395 CPU,. with a factory power consumption of 95 watts,. and its release performance ranks first. among all mini hosts. It also has. the most powerful nuclear display 8060S so far,. and its graphics performance is three times that of other nuclear display mini-consoles,. which seems to be far ahead. We appreciate that the core display performance is comparable. to the Nvidia RTX4060M. With 128 gigabytes of on-board memory. and 210 gigabytes of bandwidth,. it can run locally deployed large language models and large text graph models. With my own needs,. it has been able. to meet me very well. The possible disadvantage of this small mainframe is that it is too expensive. We really didn't expect that AMD. which has always been affordable. would push the performance of the core display mobile standard CPU so high. whether it is CPU or graphics performance. Three times the graphics performance,. ah, as well as the 128G memory on board,. which together put the price. of the small host at. more than 10000 yuan. I can't think of a competitor. other than Apple Studio. To sum up,. the 95 watt performance release. of the Evo-X2 factory CPU and the 120 watt performance release. of the GPU. are the strongest x86 mini hosts at present. No one. 128G super large memory. support open source Qwen3235B large language model and open source StableDiffusion3.5L arge text graph model. heat dissipation. Quiet and stable. perfect interface compatibility. Brand-new design,. exquisite workmanship performance. For. friends who need. 128G of large memory,. local deployment of large language model and local deployment. of Wensheng graph model,. I give this mini console a "highly recommended" rating. This is a very. very powerful super king mini console. All right, that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching. Goodbye.

item.description:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 擁有目前 mini host 中最強悍的 x86 處理器效能，並在多項基準測試中名列前茅。

  • 搭載史上最強的核心顯示卡 8060S，其性能在迷你主機領域遙遙領先，足以應對部分 AAA 遊戲。

  • 具備高達 128GB 的板載記憶體，實測證明其在本地端順暢運行大型語言模型及文生圖模型的能力。



摘要


前言與硬體規格


影片中，Laobai 向觀眾介紹了 GMK EVO-X2 這款搭載 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 CPU 的高效能迷你電腦。他指出這是目前 x86 迷你主機中效能最為強悍的產品，內建預期在 2025 年出現的行動標準電壓 CPU，其綜合效能超越了作者先前測試過的每一款迷你主機。GMK EVO-X2 最引人注目的特色在於其內建的 8060S 核心顯示卡，其效能是作者測試過的最強核心顯卡的近三倍；同時，它擁有高達 128GB 的板載記憶體和 200GB 的頻寬，這對於在本地端部署大型語言模型提供了強大的硬體基礎。作者也詳細列出了其規格，包含 16 個 Zen5 大核、32 執行緒、40CU 8060S 核心顯示卡、128GB LPDDR5X 8000MHz 記憶體、雙 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe SSD 插槽、四螢幕輸出、2.5G 網路卡及 WiFi 7。




硬體外觀與內部結構


Laobai 開箱展示了主機本體及所有配件，包括電源線、HDMI 線和手冊，並特別提到 230W 的變壓器。主機外殼採用金屬與塑膠拼接設計。作者詳細介紹了前置面板的介面，包含電源開關、效能釋放按鈕、SD 卡槽、支援 DP 輸出功能的 USB4 介面、雙 USB 3.2 Gen2A 連接埠、耳機孔及 LED 燈效切換鈕。後方面板則配置了電源接口、後置音訊接口、2.5G 網路接口、USB 3.2 Gen2A 連接埠、另一個支援 DP 輸出的 USB4 介面、DP 1.4、HDMI 2.1 以及雙 USB 2.0 接口。在散熱設計上，後方為出風口，底部和上方則是進風口。作者也示範了如何拆開頂蓋，展示了內部的後置散熱風扇、板載的 128GB 記憶體，以及兩個 2280 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 插槽（其中一個已安裝 2TB SSD，另一個空閒），以及 WiFi 7 無線網卡。




大型語言模型 (LLM) 本地端部署實測


作為重點測試項目，Laobai 實測了 GMK EVO-X2 在本地端執行 AI 模型的能力。這台主機的 128GB 記憶體可透過 AMD 顯示卡軟體彈性分配，最高可將顯存設為 96GB。記憶體頻寬實測達到 211GB/s。在 Llama3 8B 模型測試中，推理速度為 36.95 tok/s，與 RTX 4060M/4070M 及高配版 M4 Pro Mac mini 相當。Qwen3 14B 模型測試速度為 20.28 tok/s，而 Qwen3 32B 則為 9.61 tok/s (顯存佔用 20GB)。對於 QwenMOE 30B 專家模型 (只需 3B 推理)，速度則高達 52.89 tok/s。作者甚至嘗試載入需要 86GB 或 101GB 記憶體的大型 Qwen3 235B MOE 模型，雖然遇到一些載入問題，但最終在 64GB 顯存分配下，86GB 版本的速度為 14.71 tok/s，101GB 版本為 10.51 tok/s。作者總結，憑藉 128GB 記憶體，EVO-X2 確實能夠運行一般顯示卡無法載入的超大型開源模型，且部分模型的推理速度表現不錯。




文生圖模型 (Text-to-Image) 本地端部署


除了 LLM，作者也測試了文生圖模型的本地端執行。使用了 AMD 推薦的 Amuse (Vincent) 模型，該模型可利用 NPU 加速。簡單模式下的模型顯存佔用少於 4GB。在進階模式中，可以載入更大的模型，如開源最強的 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large (26GB 模型)。作者測試載入該模型，並生成一張 1024x1024 圖片後超分至 2048x2048。最終生成一張圖片耗時約 400 秒（超過 7 分鐘），過程中使用了 33GB 顯存。作者認為，128GB 的大記憶體在本地部署需要大量顯存的文生圖模型方面，展現了其獨特優勢。




綜合性能與基準測試


Laobai 展示了 BIOS 介面，確認了 128GB 記憶體和 8000MHz 頻率，並提供了安靜 (54W)、平衡 (85W) 和效能 (95W) 三種功耗模式選項。所有效能測試均在最強的 95W 模式下進行。作者進行了 AIDA64 FPU 單烤穩定性測試，CPU 功耗穩定在 95W，整機功耗約 154W，CPU 頻率穩定在 3.1GHz，在室溫 32 度下烤機一小時仍保持穩定，CPU 溫度最高 99 度。在視訊轉碼測試中，僅比 i9-14900KF 慢一秒，成績優秀 (406 秒)。



CPU 基準測試結果突出：CPU-Z 多執行緒 15098 (迷你主機中最高)、單執行緒 801；Cinebench R23 多核心 36182 (所有迷你主機排名第一)、單核心 1991；Cinebench 2024 多核心 1829 (所有迷你主機排名第一)、單核心 114；PassMark 多執行緒 59027 (所有迷你主機排名第一)。Geekbench 5/6 多核心也分別位列第三和第二。這些數據證實了 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 在迷你主機領域的頂級 CPU 效能，尤其是在多核心表現上。



在 OpenWRT 的 CoreMark 測試中，得分高達 1058264，這不僅超越了其他所有迷你主機，更是第一台突破百萬分的迷你主機，顯示其在特定工作負載下的高效能。




核心顯示卡 (iGPU) 性能測試與遊戲實測


在核心顯示卡方面，8060S 甜甜圈單烤 GPU 功耗約 120W。3DMark 測試結果令人印象深刻：Time Spy 11696 (高於 RTX 4060M)，Fire Strike 30720 (高於 RTX 4070M 和 4060M)，Steel Nomad Light 83.91 FPS (略高於滿血版 RTX 4060M)。Laobai 強調，這些成績比其他迷你主機中最強的核心顯卡高出近三倍，展現了 8060S 在集成顯示卡領域的巨大飛躍。在《地平線 5》的遊戲實測中，4K 超高畫質、兩倍反鋸齒設定下，普通場景可達 70~80 幀，複雜場景也超過 60 幀。2K 極限畫質下的測試結果在影片截斷前未能完全展示。

# 最后总结

The EVO-X2 is equipped with AMD Ryzen AIMax + 395 CPU,. with a factory power consumption of 95 watts,. and its release performance ranks first. among all mini hosts. It also has. the most powerful nuclear display 8060S so far,. and its graphics performance is three times that of other nuclear display mini-consoles,. which seems to be far ahead. We appreciate that the core display performance is comparable. to the Nvidia RTX4060M. With 128 gigabytes of on-board memory. and 210 gigabytes of bandwidth,. it can run locally deployed large language models and large text graph models. With my own needs,. it has been able. to meet me very well. The possible disadvantage of this small mainframe is that it is too expensive. We really didn't expect that AMD. which has always been affordable. would push the performance of the core display mobile standard CPU so high. whether it is CPU or graphics performance. Three times the graphics performance,. ah, as well as the 128G memory on board,. which together put the price. of the small host at. more than 10000 yuan. I can't think of a competitor. other than Apple Studio. To sum up,. the 95 watt performance release. of the Evo-X2 factory CPU and the 120 watt performance release. of the GPU. are the strongest x86 mini hosts at present. No one. 128G super large memory. support open source Qwen3235B large language model and open source StableDiffusion3.5L arge text graph model. heat dissipation. Quiet and stable. perfect interface compatibility. Brand-new design,. exquisite workmanship performance. For. friends who need. 128G of large memory,. local deployment of large language model and local deployment. of Wensheng graph model,. I give this mini console a "highly recommended" rating. This is a very. very powerful super king mini console. All right, that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching. Goodbye.

item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 擁有目前 mini host 中最強悍的 x86 處理器效能，並在多項基準測試中名列前茅。

  • 搭載史上最強的核心顯示卡 8060S，其性能在迷你主機領域遙遙領先，足以應對部分 AAA 遊戲。

  • 具備高達 128GB 的板載記憶體，實測證明其在本地端順暢運行大型語言模型及文生圖模型的能力。



摘要


前言與硬體規格


影片中，Laobai 向觀眾介紹了 GMK EVO-X2 這款搭載 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 CPU 的高效能迷你電腦。他指出這是目前 x86 迷你主機中效能最為強悍的產品，內建預期在 2025 年出現的行動標準電壓 CPU，其綜合效能超越了作者先前測試過的每一款迷你主機。GMK EVO-X2 最引人注目的特色在於其內建的 8060S 核心顯示卡，其效能是作者測試過的最強核心顯卡的近三倍；同時，它擁有高達 128GB 的板載記憶體和 200GB 的頻寬，這對於在本地端部署大型語言模型提供了強大的硬體基礎。作者也詳細列出了其規格，包含 16 個 Zen5 大核、32 執行緒、40CU 8060S 核心顯示卡、128GB LPDDR5X 8000MHz 記憶體、雙 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe SSD 插槽、四螢幕輸出、2.5G 網路卡及 WiFi 7。




硬體外觀與內部結構


Laobai 開箱展示了主機本體及所有配件，包括電源線、HDMI 線和手冊，並特別提到 230W 的變壓器。主機外殼採用金屬與塑膠拼接設計。作者詳細介紹了前置面板的介面，包含電源開關、效能釋放按鈕、SD 卡槽、支援 DP 輸出功能的 USB4 介面、雙 USB 3.2 Gen2A 連接埠、耳機孔及 LED 燈效切換鈕。後方面板則配置了電源接口、後置音訊接口、2.5G 網路接口、USB 3.2 Gen2A 連接埠、另一個支援 DP 輸出的 USB4 介面、DP 1.4、HDMI 2.1 以及雙 USB 2.0 接口。在散熱設計上，後方為出風口，底部和上方則是進風口。作者也示範了如何拆開頂蓋，展示了內部的後置散熱風扇、板載的 128GB 記憶體，以及兩個 2280 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 插槽（其中一個已安裝 2TB SSD，另一個空閒），以及 WiFi 7 無線網卡。




大型語言模型 (LLM) 本地端部署實測


作為重點測試項目，Laobai 實測了 GMK EVO-X2 在本地端執行 AI 模型的能力。這台主機的 128GB 記憶體可透過 AMD 顯示卡軟體彈性分配，最高可將顯存設為 96GB。記憶體頻寬實測達到 211GB/s。在 Llama3 8B 模型測試中，推理速度為 36.95 tok/s，與 RTX 4060M/4070M 及高配版 M4 Pro Mac mini 相當。Qwen3 14B 模型測試速度為 20.28 tok/s，而 Qwen3 32B 則為 9.61 tok/s (顯存佔用 20GB)。對於 QwenMOE 30B 專家模型 (只需 3B 推理)，速度則高達 52.89 tok/s。作者甚至嘗試載入需要 86GB 或 101GB 記憶體的大型 Qwen3 235B MOE 模型，雖然遇到一些載入問題，但最終在 64GB 顯存分配下，86GB 版本的速度為 14.71 tok/s，101GB 版本為 10.51 tok/s。作者總結，憑藉 128GB 記憶體，EVO-X2 確實能夠運行一般顯示卡無法載入的超大型開源模型，且部分模型的推理速度表現不錯。




文生圖模型 (Text-to-Image) 本地端部署


除了 LLM，作者也測試了文生圖模型的本地端執行。使用了 AMD 推薦的 Amuse (Vincent) 模型，該模型可利用 NPU 加速。簡單模式下的模型顯存佔用少於 4GB。在進階模式中，可以載入更大的模型，如開源最強的 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large (26GB 模型)。作者測試載入該模型，並生成一張 1024x1024 圖片後超分至 2048x2048。最終生成一張圖片耗時約 400 秒（超過 7 分鐘），過程中使用了 33GB 顯存。作者認為，128GB 的大記憶體在本地部署需要大量顯存的文生圖模型方面，展現了其獨特優勢。




綜合性能與基準測試


Laobai 展示了 BIOS 介面，確認了 128GB 記憶體和 8000MHz 頻率，並提供了安靜 (54W)、平衡 (85W) 和效能 (95W) 三種功耗模式選項。所有效能測試均在最強的 95W 模式下進行。作者進行了 AIDA64 FPU 單烤穩定性測試，CPU 功耗穩定在 95W，整機功耗約 154W，CPU 頻率穩定在 3.1GHz，在室溫 32 度下烤機一小時仍保持穩定，CPU 溫度最高 99 度。在視訊轉碼測試中，僅比 i9-14900KF 慢一秒，成績優秀 (406 秒)。



CPU 基準測試結果突出：CPU-Z 多執行緒 15098 (迷你主機中最高)、單執行緒 801；Cinebench R23 多核心 36182 (所有迷你主機排名第一)、單核心 1991；Cinebench 2024 多核心 1829 (所有迷你主機排名第一)、單核心 114；PassMark 多執行緒 59027 (所有迷你主機排名第一)。Geekbench 5/6 多核心也分別位列第三和第二。這些數據證實了 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 在迷你主機領域的頂級 CPU 效能，尤其是在多核心表現上。



在 OpenWRT 的 CoreMark 測試中，得分高達 1058264，這不僅超越了其他所有迷你主機，更是第一台突破百萬分的迷你主機，顯示其在特定工作負載下的高效能。




核心顯示卡 (iGPU) 性能測試與遊戲實測


在核心顯示卡方面，8060S 甜甜圈單烤 GPU 功耗約 120W。3DMark 測試結果令人印象深刻：Time Spy 11696 (高於 RTX 4060M)，Fire Strike 30720 (高於 RTX 4070M 和 4060M)，Steel Nomad Light 83.91 FPS (略高於滿血版 RTX 4060M)。Laobai 強調，這些成績比其他迷你主機中最強的核心顯卡高出近三倍，展現了 8060S 在集成顯示卡領域的巨大飛躍。在《地平線 5》的遊戲實測中，4K 超高畫質、兩倍反鋸齒設定下，普通場景可達 70~80 幀，複雜場景也超過 60 幀。2K 極限畫質下的測試結果在影片截斷前未能完全展示。



================================================

# Intro

It is the most powerful x86 mini host. at present,. with the highly anticipated mobile standard pressure CPU CPU in 2025. Performance outperforms every mini console we've. ever tested. It has its own 8060S core graphics performance,. which is nearly three times that of the strongest core. we have tested. It has 128 gigabytes of onboard memory and 200 gigabytes. of bandwidth,. which is enough for us to deploy the large language model locally. Hello everyone,. I am Laobai,. and today I will introduce to you. the high-performance mini computer GMK EVO-X2. with AMD Ryzen AIMax + 395 CPU. The small host of 128G on-board high-frequency memory device Max +. 395 CPU has finally arrived,. regardless of. the price,. its nuclear display. That is, 40CU 8060S allows. us to play 1080P 3A games. Its 128 gigabytes of memory allows. us to better cope with large language models. So do you pay more attention to the performance of. the core display or the large memory of 128G? Gee-Moke EVO-X2 Device AMD RyzenAIMax + 39516 Zen5 Large Core 32 Thread Standard Pressure Mobile CPU. AMD Radeon 8060S core display board with built-in 40CU. NvmeSSD with. 128GLPDDR5X memory,. 8000MHz dual PCIe 4.0X4 quad-screen display output. 2.5G network card plus WiFi 7.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look. The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cord, HDMI Cable Manual. This power supply 19.5 volts. 11.8. amps total 230 watts. of power.

The shell of the small mainframe is spliced with metal and plastic. Front panel. of fuselage interface: power switch key,. performance release switch button, SD card slot,. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP display signal. Dual USB 3.2 Gen2A port front headset interface,. here is the fan. led. light effect switching button. Back panel:. 19V power connector Rear audio connector Must give a good review. 2.5G network interface, USB3.2Gen2A port,. USB4 interface capable of outputting DP display signal,. DP1.4. interface,. HDMI 2. 1 interface, dual USB 2.0 interface. The rear part is the air outlet,. and the bottom and upper sides. are the air inlets.

To remove these two rubber pads. only four screws on the upper part need to be removed.

Opening the top cover. let's take a look at the interfaces inside. This is. the rear cooling fan,. and the 128G memory is onboard with two sets. of 2280 PCIe 4.0x4nvme connectors already installed. A Viagra Legend9002 TB nvmeSSD is vacant. Another set of. PCIe 4.0 nvmeRZ717WiFi7 wireless cards.

# 本地部署AI模型

Today. let's first test the AI model that everyone is most concerned about. The CPU is Max + 395. and the core display is. 8060S 128 G Memory is divided into two parts,. 64g of. running memory and 64g of dedicated video memory. The video memory allocation function is not in the BIOS,. but in the AMD graphics configuration software. In the Performance menu-Adjust options. here we can set the memory size of the discrete graphics card. up to 96 G. We also tested the memory bandwidth. up to 211GB/s. which is not bad. First of all,. let's run the regular LlaMa3.18B big language model test or snake. programming. 36.95 tok/s is. similar. to the Nvidia single display RTX4060M4070M. we tested. It's also. similar to the 24-gigabyte M4 Pro Mac mini. You should know that the M4 Pro Mac mini is equipped. with 64 gigabytes of memory and 2TB SSD,. which is worth 20,000 yuan! The next test is. the newly released Qwen314B,. which is a reasoning model with. a thinking process. We can also add no _ thinking to turn off. the thought process. The final result is 20.28 tok/s,. For the newly released Qwen332B. note that the video memory has reached 20g. If it is a general single display. the video memory has already exploded. The final result is: 9.61 tok/s. For the above two Qwen314B and 32B,. all the parameters are used together. when reasoning. The next test is that the QwenMOE expert model is loaded with 30 B,.

but the reasoning only. needs 3 B. So the speed is very fast. Video memory usage is still 20g. Final result: 52.89 tok/s. Next, we tested the 70 BLlama model distilled. by DeepSeek,. and the video memory occupation reached 37 G,. which. was really not fast. Only the 5.45 tok/sllama model is not well supported in Chinese. In order to test the limit of. our 128G memory,. we took a look at the Qwen3235BA22BMOE model. However. the standard three-bit quantization of this model requires 111G. and the four-bit quantization requires 142G. We definitely can't support it. So we found the dynamic quantization version of unsloth. His optimized Qwen3235BA22B2 has only 86G bit quantization. The smallest 3-bit quantization is only 101g. I don't know if it's OK. Anyway. download it and test it. First, the video memory was allocated 96 G,. and after restarting,. the test found that the loading would go wrong at the end. I don't know if it's. the model or the LMStudio,. but I can't fix it for a long time. Finally. it returned to the allocation state of 64g memory and 64g video memory. Load the 86 G version of 2-bit quantization. please be sure to modify according to the parameters on the screen. otherwise the speed will be greatly reduced. Video memory occupies 64g. memory occupies 30g. Final result: 14.71 tok/s. It's okay. It's better than I expected. Qwen3235BGPUOffload. loaded with 3-bit quantized 101G version. can be pulled to 89. or 90. Others, please follow our modification.

64G of video memory and 43G. of memory.

The final result is 10.51 tok/s. In these different sizes of. local open source models that we tested,. A 2-bit quantized version. of the maximum Qwen3235BA22 B86G. and a three-bit quantized version of 101 G. are available. Although the speed of use. down only 15 ~ 11tok/sQwen314B. can have 20tok/sQwen332B. Only close to. 10tok/sQwen330BA3B has 52tok/s. I think they're all available. Especially the Qwen330BA3BMOE model is really fast. and good. In addition to having the small host locally deploy the large language model. we also tested locally deploying the text graph model. Amuse Amuse. which is officially recommended by AMD. is able to use NPU to accelerate the Vincent graph. This is the first time I've seen NPU used.

The Wensheng graph model loaded in the simple version is relatively small. occupying less than 4 gigabytes of video memory. When we enter the advanced mode of Amuse. we can download many large models of open source text graphs. The simple model uses SDXL Turbo. which is the first one. It also indicates that we can use Ryzen AI. which is our NPU. Quick drawing, small drawing,. just use it. To be a little more professional,. you need to use the most powerful open source model,. StableDiffusion3.5 Large,. which has 26 gigabytes. Let's try to load it up. It generates a 1024 × 1024 picture. But we can get a big picture. of 2048 × 2048 through super score and give. it a prompt word.

Finally, it took about 400 seconds. to use 33 gigabytes of video memory,. that is, more than 7 minutes to produce a picture.

Local deployment of the large language model and the Wensheng graph model can take full advantage. of the large memory of 128 GB. I think the EVO-X2 is. really good at this point.

# 稳定度与性能测试

128 gigabytes of memory. can be seen on the home page of the BIOS,. and the 8000 MHz. home page. can be modified to release quiet 54 watts and balanced 85 watts. Performance 95 watts. Three options. We chose the strongest performance mode to test,. and we must remember to modify the size. of the video memory here. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. When we opened the pressure test of aida64 running FPU single baking. the CPU slowly declined (from 130 W). running at 95 W. and the power consumption of the whole machine ran to about 154 W. CPU frequency stabilized at 3.1GHz. We baked it for 1 hour and 03 minutes. CPU temperature up to. 99 degrees SSD up to 51 degrees. at room temperature of 32 degrees. Let's use the Ryzen AIMax + 395. CPU of the EVO-X2 mini console to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result was 6 minutes and 46 seconds. a total of 406 seconds and 406 seconds. only one second slower than 14900KF. Very good grades. CPUZ Multithreaded 15098. 3 Single thread 801. 3 Multithreading is currently the highest in the mini host. Top one. Geekbench 5 multi-core. 17502 single-core. 2233 multi-core results ranked third in the mini host. Geekbench 6 Multi-Core 17165. Single Core 2936. Multi-core performance ranked second in the mini host. Cinebench R23 Multi-Core 36182 Single Core 1991 Multi-Core Ranked. First. in All Mini Mainframes. Cine bnech2024 multi-core 1829 single-core 114 multi-core. ranked. first among all mini-consoles. PassMark Multithread 59027 Single Thread 4267 Multithread score is. the first. of all mini hosts. Based on the above comparison,. the AIMax + 395. multi-core performance of the EVO-X2. ranks the highest among all mini hosts. Then look. at. the entertainment master total score 3459253 CPU score 1924213. We ran openWRT test. on RyzenAIMax + 395. AES896076chacha20256799CoreMark1058264.

Surpasses all other mini hosts in. CoreMark performance,. ranking first. This is the first mini console to score 1 million points. N100 million points,. N305 million points,. 8845HS50 million points,. HX37069 million points,. 7945HX91 million points,. Max + 395100!

# 图形与游戏性能

The core display 8060S of. Donut Single Baking GPU Max + 395 runs out of. about 120 watts of power consumption. CPU and GPU with CPUZ Dual Bake Max. + 395 both run out. of 120 watts of power consumption. Run. 3DMark test TimeSpy11696FireStrike30720 SteelNomadLight83. 91FPS stability test with. 97.9% Take. a look through the list. TimeSpy is higher than RTX4060M,. lower than RTX4070M8060S,. and nearly three times higher than other mini hosts with. the highest core display. FireStrike is higher than RTX4070M and 4060M,. and is. still three times higher than highest x86 core display mini console. SteelNomadLight's RTX4060M. which is slightly more than full blood. is three times the size of other top nuclear display mini-consoles. Next to play the game. Horizon 5: 4K super high quality. twice anti-aliasing. Ordinary scene more than 70, close to 80 frames. Complex scene, more than 60 frames.

2K extreme picture quality. double anti-aliasing. Normal scene about 90 frames.

Complex scene, about 80 frames.

Horizon 4: 2K Ultra High Quality with. Twice Anti-Aliasing. No less than 170 frames throughout.

4K super high picture quality. no less than 110 frames in the whole process. very Nice.

Wild Arms 2: The average frame of the evaluation test. of 1080P ultra-high quality operation. is 81 frames. 2K, super high, picture quality.

Average frame 63,. Tomb Raider Shadow: 1080p Highest Quality Running. Evaluation Test Average Frame 133. Frames,. 2K highest quality. average frame 91 frames. Finally, let's test. the Black Myth Wukong 1080P overshoot 55FSR equalization mode. to open the frame generation picture quality customization,. almost all. of which are high. The test result is that the average frame is 136 frames. In actual combat,.

This is the game experience that 8060s. nuclear display brings to us. Let's chart the Tomb Raider shadow test results and compare. them. 8060S is still good. and RTX4060M has its own wins and losses. lower than RTX4070M.

# 显示存储网络

Display output. HDMI 2.1 interface. can output up to 4K120 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal. USB4 and DP interfaces. can output up. to 4K144 Hz 10-bit RGB display signals. Our monitor DP interface can be overclocked. to 160 Hz. After overclocking, this small host can. output 4K 160 Hz 10-bit RGB display signals. Connect Sony OLED. TV HDMI interface to. output 4K 120 Hz 8-bit RGB display signal. Video decoding capability of 8060S core display. It can hardwire local 8K 60 frame AV1 video,. Youtube 8K 60 frame AV1 video smooth playback. The original hard drive tested. 7000MB/s,. which is the highest speed of PCIe 4.0X4. USB4 interface external Thunderbolt hard disk box 3100MB/s,. which is. a good performance of USB4 external storage. At this time, our other USB4 interface is connected. to a high-brush monitor,. indicating that our dual USB4 interface has. no compatibility problems. We also tested the WiFi network card of the small host,. this time the RZ717 WiFi7 wireless network card ran. above 870 megabits per second. It is a good wireless performance in. my wireless network environment. We also used iperf3 to test. the performance of RealTek 2.5G network card. Both single-threaded uploads and downloads. and multi-threaded uploads and downloads have reached nearly 2. 35 G,. which is full of. bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

The AMDRyzenAIMax + 395 CPU of. the EVO-X2 has a performance release of 95 watts under Windows,. and the power consumption performance is listed. for you to see. Up to 220 watts,. standby power consumption is only 7.2 watts. A 230W DC power supply will do the trick. When the room temperature is 30 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 34.2 degrees. SSD standby temperature 34 degrees. When the productivity test CPU is 100%,. the fuselage 61 decibels is placed. at the ear position. 49 decibels. We also tested other performance release modes,. such as. 54 watts in. cool mode and 85 watts. in balanced mode. If you don't have very high performance requirements. it is recommended to use balanced mode or calm mode.

# 最后总结

The EVO-X2 is equipped with AMD Ryzen AIMax + 395 CPU,. with a factory power consumption of 95 watts,. and its release performance ranks first. among all mini hosts. It also has. the most powerful nuclear display 8060S so far,. and its graphics performance is three times that of other nuclear display mini-consoles,. which seems to be far ahead. We appreciate that the core display performance is comparable. to the Nvidia RTX4060M. With 128 gigabytes of on-board memory. and 210 gigabytes of bandwidth,. it can run locally deployed large language models and large text graph models. With my own needs,. it has been able. to meet me very well. The possible disadvantage of this small mainframe is that it is too expensive. We really didn't expect that AMD. which has always been affordable. would push the performance of the core display mobile standard CPU so high. whether it is CPU or graphics performance. Three times the graphics performance,. ah, as well as the 128G memory on board,. which together put the price. of the small host at. more than 10000 yuan. I can't think of a competitor. other than Apple Studio. To sum up,. the 95 watt performance release. of the Evo-X2 factory CPU and the 120 watt performance release. of the GPU. are the strongest x86 mini hosts at present. No one. 128G super large memory. support open source Qwen3235B large language model and open source StableDiffusion3.5L arge text graph model. heat dissipation. Quiet and stable. perfect interface compatibility. Brand-new design,. exquisite workmanship performance. For. friends who need. 128G of large memory,. local deployment of large language model and local deployment. of Wensheng graph model,. I give this mini console a "highly recommended" rating. This is a very. very powerful super king mini console. All right, that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching. Goodbye.
